51 /* Get OH data from climatology... */

54 /* Apply diurnal correction... */

void clim_oh_diurnal_correction ( ctl_t *  ctl,
clim_t *  clim

Initialization function for OH climatology.

Definition at line 67 of file libtrac.c.

69 {
70
71 /* Loop over climatology data points... */
72 for (int it = 0; it < clim->oh.ntime; it++)
73 for (int iz = 0; iz < clim->oh.np; iz++)
74 for (int iy = 0; iy < clim->oh.nlat; iy++) {
75
76 /* Init... */
77 int n = 0;
78 double sum = 0;
79
80 /* Integrate day/night correction factor over longitude... */
81 for (double lon = -180; lon < 180; lon += 1.0) {
82 double sza = sza_calc(clim->oh.time[it], lon, clim->oh.lat[iy]);
83 if (sza <= M_PI / 2. * 85. / 90.)
84 sum += exp(-ctl->oh_chem_beta / cos(sza));
85 else
86 sum += exp(-ctl->oh_chem_beta / cos(M_PI / 2. * 85. / 90.));
87 n++;
88 }
89
90 /* Apply scaling factor to OH data... */
91 clim->oh.vmr[it][iz][iy] /= (sum / (double) n);
92 }
93}

307 /* Get range... */
308 double tropomin = 1e99, tropomax = -1e99;
309 for (int it = 0; it < clim->tropo_ntime; it++)
310 for (int iy = 0; iy < clim->tropo_nlat; iy++) {
311 tropomin = GSL_MIN(tropomin, clim->tropo[it][iy]);
312 tropomax = GSL_MAX(tropomax, clim->tropo[it][iy]);
313 }
314
315 /* Write info... */
316 LOG(2, "Number of time steps: %d", clim->tropo_ntime);
317 LOG(2, "Time steps: %.2f, %.2f ... %.2f s",
318 clim->tropo_time[0], clim->tropo_time[1],
319 clim->tropo_time[clim->tropo_ntime - 1]);
320 LOG(2, "Number of latitudes: %d", clim->tropo_nlat);
321 LOG(2, "Latitudes: %g, %g ... %g deg",
322 clim->tropo_lat[0], clim->tropo_lat[1],
323 clim->tropo_lat[clim->tropo_nlat - 1]);
324 LOG(2, "Tropopause altitude range: %g ... %g hPa", Z(tropomax),
325 Z(tropomin));
326 LOG(2, "Tropopause pressure range: %g ... %g hPa", tropomin, tropomax);
327}

333 {
334
335 /* Interpolate... */

339 return ts->vmr[ts->ntime - 1];

353 {
354
355 /* Get seconds since begin of year... */
356 double sec = FMOD(t, 365.25 * 86400.);
357 while (sec < 0)
358 sec += 365.25 * 86400.;
359
360 /* Check pressure range... */
361 double p_help = p;
362 if (p < zm->p[zm->np - 1])
363 p_help = zm->p[zm->np - 1];
364 else if (p > zm->p[0])
365 p_help = zm->p[0];
366
367 /* Check latitude range... */
368 double lat_help = lat;
369 if (lat < zm->lat[0])
370 lat_help = zm->lat[0];
371 else if (lat > zm->lat[zm->nlat - 1])
372 lat_help = zm->lat[zm->nlat - 1];
373
374 /* Get indices... */
375 int isec = locate_irr(zm->time, zm->ntime, sec);
376 int ilat = locate_reg(zm->lat, zm->nlat, lat_help);
377 int ip = locate_irr(zm->p, zm->np, p_help);
378
379 /* Interpolate climatology data... */
380 double aux00 = LIN(zm->p[ip], zm->vmr[isec][ip][ilat],
381 zm->p[ip + 1], zm->vmr[isec][ip + 1][ilat], p_help);
382 double aux01 = LIN(zm->p[ip], zm->vmr[isec][ip][ilat + 1],
383 zm->p[ip + 1], zm->vmr[isec][ip + 1][ilat + 1], p_help);
384 double aux10 = LIN(zm->p[ip], zm->vmr[isec + 1][ip][ilat],
385 zm->p[ip + 1], zm->vmr[isec + 1][ip + 1][ilat], p_help);
386 double aux11 = LIN(zm->p[ip], zm->vmr[isec + 1][ip][ilat + 1],
387 zm->p[ip + 1], zm->vmr[isec + 1][ip + 1][ilat + 1],
388 p_help);
389 aux00 = LIN(zm->lat[ilat], aux00, zm->lat[ilat + 1], aux01, lat_help);
390 aux11 = LIN(zm->lat[ilat], aux10, zm->lat[ilat + 1], aux11, lat_help);
391 aux00 = LIN(zm->time[isec], aux00, zm->time[isec + 1], aux11, sec);
392
393 return GSL_MAX(aux00, 0.0);
394}

)

Definition at line 398 of file libtrac.c.

404 {
405
406 double min[EP], max[EP], off[EP], scl[EP];
407
408 unsigned short *sarray;
409
410 /* Allocate... */
411 ALLOC(sarray, unsigned short,
412 nxy * nz);
413
414 /* Read compressed stream and decompress array... */
415 if (decompress) {
416
417 /* Write info... */
418 LOG(2, "Read 3-D variable: %s (pack, RATIO= %g %%)",
419 varname, 100. * sizeof(unsigned short) / sizeof(float));
420
421 /* Read data... */
422 FREAD(&scl, double,
423 nz,
424 inout);
425 FREAD(&off, double,
426 nz,
427 inout);
428 FREAD(sarray, unsigned short,
429 nxy * nz,
430 inout);
431
432 /* Convert to float... */
433#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
434 for (size_t ixy = 0; ixy < nxy; ixy++)
435 for (size_t iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++)
436 array[ixy * nz + iz]
437 = (float) (sarray[ixy * nz + iz] * scl[iz] + off[iz]);
438 }
439
440 /* Compress array and output compressed stream... */
441 else {
442
443 /* Write info... */
444 LOG(2, "Write 3-D variable: %s (pack, RATIO= %g %%)",
445 varname, 100. * sizeof(unsigned short) / sizeof(float));
446
447 /* Get range... */
448 for (size_t iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++) {
449 min[iz] = array[iz];
450 max[iz] = array[iz];
451 }
452 for (size_t ixy = 1; ixy < nxy; ixy++)
453 for (size_t iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++) {
454 if (array[ixy * nz + iz] < min[iz])
455 min[iz] = array[ixy * nz + iz];
456 if (array[ixy * nz + iz] > max[iz])
457 max[iz] = array[ixy * nz + iz];
458 }
459
460 /* Get offset and scaling factor... */
461 for (size_t iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++) {
462 scl[iz] = (max[iz] - min[iz]) / 65533.;
463 off[iz] = min[iz];
464 }
465
466 /* Convert to short... */
467#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
468 for (size_t ixy = 0; ixy < nxy; ixy++)
469 for (size_t iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++)
470 if (scl[iz] != 0)
471 sarray[ixy * nz + iz] = (unsigned short)
472 ((array[ixy * nz + iz] - off[iz]) / scl[iz] + .5);
473 else
474 sarray[ixy * nz + iz] = 0;
475
476 /* Write data... */
477 FWRITE(&scl, double,
478 nz,
479 inout);
480 FWRITE(&off, double,
481 nz,
482 inout);
483 FWRITE(sarray, unsigned short,
484 nxy * nz,
485 inout);
486 }
487
488 /* Free... */
489 free(sarray);
490}

void day2doy ( const int  year,
const int  mon,

int *  doy 
)

Compress or decompress array with zfp.

Compress or decompress array with zstd.

Get day of year from date.

Definition at line 639 of file libtrac.c.

643 {
644
645 const int
646 d0[12] = { 1, 32, 60, 91, 121, 152, 182, 213, 244, 274, 305, 335 },
647 d0l[12] = { 1, 32, 61, 92, 122, 153, 183, 214, 245, 275, 306, 336 };
648
649 /* Get day of year... */
650 if (year % 400 == 0 || (year % 100 != 0 && year % 4 == 0))
651 *doy = d0l[mon - 1] + day - 1;
652 else
653 *doy = d0[mon - 1] + day - 1;
654}

◆ doy2day()

void doy2day ( const int  year,
const int  doy,
int *  mon,
int *  day 
)

Get date from day of year.

Definition at line 658 of file libtrac.c.

662 {
663
664 const int
665 d0[12] = { 1, 32, 60, 91, 121, 152, 182, 213, 244, 274, 305, 335 },
666 d0l[12] = { 1, 32, 61, 92, 122, 153, 183, 214, 245, 275, 306, 336 };
667
668 int i;
669
670 /* Get month and day... */
671 if (year % 400 == 0 || (year % 100 != 0 && year % 4 == 0)) {
672 for (i = 11; i > 0; i--)
673 if (d0l[i] <= doy)
674 break;
675 *mon = i + 1;
676 *day = doy - d0l[i] + 1;
677 } else {
678 for (i = 11; i > 0; i--)
679 if (d0[i] <= doy)
680 break;
681 *mon = i + 1;
682 *day = doy - d0[i] + 1;
683 }
684}

692 {

694 double radius = z + RE;

697 x[2] = radius * sin(lat / 180. * M_PI);

void get_met ( ctl_t *  ctl,

707 {

709 static int init;

715 /* Set timer... */
716 SELECT_TIMER("GET_MET", "INPUT", NVTX_READ);
717
718 /* Init... */
719 if (t == ctl->t_start || !init) {
720 init = 1;
721
722 /* Read meteo data... */
723 get_met_help(ctl, t + (ctl->direction == -1 ? -1 : 0), -1,
724 ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met, filename);
725 if (!read_met(filename, ctl, clim, *met0))
726 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
727
728 get_met_help(ctl, t + (ctl->direction == 1 ? 1 : 0), 1,
729 ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met, filename);
730 if (!read_met(filename, ctl, clim, *met1))
731 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
732
733 /* Update GPU... */
734#ifdef _OPENACC
735 SELECT_TIMER("UPDATE_DEVICE", "MEMORY", NVTX_H2D);
736 met_t *met0up = *met0;
737 met_t *met1up = *met1;
738#ifdef ASYNCIO
739#pragma acc update device(met0up[:1],met1up[:1]) async(5)
740#else
741#pragma acc update device(met0up[:1],met1up[:1])
742#endif
743 SELECT_TIMER("GET_MET", "INPUT", NVTX_READ);
744#endif
745
746 /* Caching... */
747 if (ctl->met_cache && t != ctl->t_stop) {
748 get_met_help(ctl, t + 1.1 * ctl->dt_met * ctl->direction,
749 ctl->direction, ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met, cachefile);
750 sprintf(cmd, "cat %s > /dev/null &", cachefile);
751 LOG(1, "Caching: %s", cachefile);
752 if (system(cmd) != 0)
753 WARN("Caching command failed!");
754 }
755 }
756
757 /* Read new data for forward trajectories... */
758 if (t > (*met1)->time) {
759
760 /* Pointer swap... */
761 mets = *met1;
762 *met1 = *met0;
763 *met0 = mets;
764
765 /* Read new meteo data... */
766 get_met_help(ctl, t, 1, ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met, filename);
767 if (!read_met(filename, ctl, clim, *met1))
768 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
769
770 /* Update GPU... */
771#ifdef _OPENACC
772 SELECT_TIMER("UPDATE_DEVICE", "MEMORY", NVTX_H2D);
773 met_t *met1up = *met1;
774#ifdef ASYNCIO
775#pragma acc update device(met1up[:1]) async(5)
776#else
777#pragma acc update device(met1up[:1])
778#endif
779 SELECT_TIMER("GET_MET", "INPUT", NVTX_READ);
780#endif
781
782 /* Caching... */
783 if (ctl->met_cache && t != ctl->t_stop) {
784 get_met_help(ctl, t + ctl->dt_met, 1, ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met,
785 cachefile);
786 sprintf(cmd, "cat %s > /dev/null &", cachefile);
787 LOG(1, "Caching: %s", cachefile);
788 if (system(cmd) != 0)
789 WARN("Caching command failed!");
790 }
791 }
792 /* Read new data for backward trajectories... */
793 if (t < (*met0)->time) {
794
795 /* Pointer swap... */
796 mets = *met1;
797 *met1 = *met0;
798 *met0 = mets;
799
800 /* Read new meteo data... */
801 get_met_help(ctl, t, -1, ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met, filename);
802 if (!read_met(filename, ctl, clim, *met0))
803 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
804
805 /* Update GPU... */
806#ifdef _OPENACC
807 SELECT_TIMER("UPDATE_DEVICE", "MEMORY", NVTX_H2D);
808 met_t *met0up = *met0;
809#ifdef ASYNCIO
810#pragma acc update device(met0up[:1]) async(5)
811#else
812#pragma acc update device(met0up[:1])
813#endif
814 SELECT_TIMER("GET_MET", "INPUT", NVTX_READ);
815#endif
816
817 /* Caching... */
818 if (ctl->met_cache && t != ctl->t_stop) {
819 get_met_help(ctl, t - ctl->dt_met, -1, ctl->metbase, ctl->dt_met,
820 cachefile);
821 sprintf(cmd, "cat %s > /dev/null &", cachefile);
822 LOG(1, "Caching: %s", cachefile);
823 if (system(cmd) != 0)
824 WARN("Caching command failed!");
825 }
826 }
827 /* Check that grids are consistent... */
828 if ((*met0)->nx != 0 && (*met1)->nx != 0) {
829 if ((*met0)->nx != (*met1)->nx
830 || (*met0)->ny != (*met1)->ny || (*met0)->np != (*met1)->np)
831 ERRMSG("Meteo grid dimensions do not match!");
832 for (int ix = 0; ix < (*met0)->nx; ix++)
833 if (fabs((*met0)->lon[ix] - (*met1)->lon[ix]) > 0.001)
834 ERRMSG("Meteo grid longitudes do not match!");
835 for (int iy = 0; iy < (*met0)->ny; iy++)
836 if (fabs((*met0)->lat[iy] - (*met1)->lat[iy]) > 0.001)
837 ERRMSG("Meteo grid latitudes do not match!");
838 for (int ip = 0; ip < (*met0)->np; ip++)
839 if (fabs((*met0)->p[ip] - (*met1)->p[ip]) > 0.001)
840 ERRMSG("Meteo grid pressure levels do not match!");
841 }
842}

912 {

914 char buffer[LEN];

918

922 return;
923 strncpy(buffer, orig, (size_t) (ch - orig));

1342 double var0, var1, wt;

1372 /* Spatial interpolation... */
1373 intpol_met_space_2d(met0, array0, lon, lat, &var0, ci, cw, init);
1374 intpol_met_space_2d(met1, array1, lon, lat, &var1, ci, cw, 0);
1375
1376 /* Get weighting factor... */
1377 wt = (met1->time - ts) / (met1->time - met0->time);
1378
1379 /* Interpolate... */
1380 if (isfinite(var0) && isfinite(var1))
1381 *var = wt * (var0 - var1) + var1;
1382 else if (wt < 0.5)
1383 *var = var1;
1384 else
1385 *var = var0;

1441 t1 = gmtime(&jsec0);

1444 *mon = t1->tm_mon + 1;
1445 *day = t1->tm_mday;
1446 *hour = t1->tm_hour;
1447 *min = t1->tm_min;

1449 *remain = jsec - floor(jsec);

double kernel_weight ( const double  kz[EP],

1510 {
1511
1512 /* Check number of data points... */
1513 if (nk < 2)
1514 return 1.0;

1516 /* Get altitude... */
1517 double z = Z(p);
1518
1519 /* Get weighting factor... */
1520 if (z < kz[0])
1521 return kw[0];
1522 else if (z > kz[nk - 1])
1523 return kw[nk - 1];

◆ lapse_rate()

double lapse_rate ( const double  t,
const double  h2o 
)

Calculate moist adiabatic lapse rate.

Definition at line 1532 of file libtrac.c.

1534 {
1535
1536 /*
1537 Calculate moist adiabatic lapse rate [K/km] from temperature [K]
1538 and water vapor volume mixing ratio [1].
1539
1540 Reference: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lapse_rate
1541 */
1542
1543 const double a = RA * SQR(t), r = SH(h2o) / (1. - SH(h2o));
1544
1545 return 1e3 * G0 * (a + LV * r * t) / (CPD * a + SQR(LV) * r * EPS);
1546}
RA
#define RA
Specific gas constant of dry air [J/(kg K)].
Definition: libtrac.h:142
SH
#define SH(h2o)
Compute specific humidity from water vapor volume mixing ratio.

Latent heat of vaporization of water [J/kg].
Definition: libtrac.h:112
G0

Standard gravity [m/s^2].
Definition: libtrac.h:102
EPS
#define EPS
Ratio of the specific gas constant of dry air and water vapor [1].

◆ nat_temperature()

double nat_temperature ( const double  p,
const double  h2o,
const double  hno3 
)

Calculate NAT existence temperature.

Definition at line 1806 of file libtrac.c.

1809 {
1810
1811 /* Check water vapor volume mixing ratio... */
1812 double h2o_help = GSL_MAX(h2o, 0.1e-6);
1813
1814 /* Calculate T_NAT... */
1815 double p_hno3 = hno3 * p / 1.333224;
1816 double p_h2o = h2o_help * p / 1.333224;
1817 double a = 0.009179 - 0.00088 * log10(p_h2o);
1818 double b = (38.9855 - log10(p_hno3) - 2.7836 * log10(p_h2o)) / a;
1819 double c = -11397.0 / a;
1820 double tnat = (-b + sqrt(b * b - 4. * c)) / 2.;
1821 double x2 = (-b - sqrt(b * b - 4. * c)) / 2.;
1822 if (x2 > 0)
1823 tnat = x2;
1824
1825 return tnat;
1826}

1848 result = read_atm_asc(filename, ctl, atm);

1865

1868 return 0;

1872 ERRMSG("Can not read any data!");
1873

1887 char msg[LEN];

1889 ctl->qnt_name[iq], ctl->qnt_format[iq],
1890 ctl->qnt_format[iq], ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
1891 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->q[iq], 1, (size_t) atm->np);
1892 LOG(2, msg, mini, maxi);
1893 }

1895 /* Return success... */

1946 {
1947
1948 /* Open file... */
1949 FILE *in;
1950 if (!(in = fopen(filename, "r")))
1951 return 0;
1952
1953 /* Check version of binary data... */
1954 int version;
1955 FREAD(&version, int,
1956 1,
1957 in);
1958 if (version != 100)
1959 ERRMSG("Wrong version of binary data!");
1960
1961 /* Read data... */
1962 FREAD(&atm->np, int,
1963 1,
1964 in);
1965 FREAD(atm->time, double,
1966 (size_t) atm->np,
1967 in);

1969 (size_t) atm->np,
1970 in);

1976 in);

1978 FREAD(atm->q[iq], double,
1979 (size_t) atm->np,
1980 in);
1981
1982 /* Read final flag... */
1983 int final;
1984 FREAD(&final, int,
1985 1,
1986 in);
1987 if (final != 999)
1988 ERRMSG("Error while reading binary data!");
1989
1990 /* Close file... */
1991 fclose(in);
1992
1993 /* Return success... */
1994 return 1;

2167 NC_GET_DOUBLE("press", photo->p, 1);

2199 photo->n2o[ip][is][io] =
2200 help1[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2201 photo->ccl4[ip][is][io] =
2202 help2[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];

2204 help3[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2205 photo->ccl2f2[ip][is][io] =
2206 help4[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];

2208

2210 NC_GET_DOUBLE("J_O3b", help2, 1);
2211 NC_GET_DOUBLE("J_O3a", help3, 1);
2212 NC_GET_DOUBLE("J_H2O2", help4, 1);
2213 for (ip = 0; ip < photo->np; ip++)
2214 for (is = 0; is < photo->nsza; is++)
2215 for (io = 0; io < photo->no3c; io++) {
2216 photo->o2[ip][is][io] =
2217 help1[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2218 photo->o3_1[ip][is][io] =
2219 help2[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];

2221 help3[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2222 photo->h2o2[ip][is][io] =
2223 help4[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2224 }
2225 NC_GET_DOUBLE("J_H2O", help1, 1);

2227 for (is = 0; is < photo->nsza; is++)
2228 for (io = 0; io < photo->no3c; io++)
2229 photo->h2o[ip][is][io] =
2230 help1[ARRAY_3D(ip, is, photo->nsza, io, photo->no3c)];
2231 free(help1);
2232 free(help2);
2233 free(help3);
2234 free(help4);
2235
2236 /* Close netCDF file... */

◆ read_clim_ts()

int read_clim_ts ( const char *  filename,
clim_ts_t *  ts 
)

Read climatological time series.

Definition at line 2242 of file libtrac.c.

2244 {
2245
2246 /* Write info... */
2247 LOG(1, "Read climatological time series: %s", filename);
2248
2249 /* Open file... */
2250 FILE *in;
2251 if (!(in = fopen(filename, "r"))) {
2252 WARN("Cannot open file!");
2253 return 0;
2254 }
2255
2256 /* Read data... */
2257 char line[LEN];
2258 int nh = 0;
2259 while (fgets(line, LEN, in))
2260 if (sscanf(line, "%lg %lg", &ts->time[nh], &ts->vmr[nh]) == 2) {
2261
2262 /* Convert years to seconds... */
2263 ts->time[nh] = (ts->time[nh] - 2000.0) * 365.25 * 86400.;
2264
2265 /* Check data... */
2266 if (nh > 0 && ts->time[nh] <= ts->time[nh - 1])
2267 ERRMSG("Time series must be ascending!");
2268
2269 /* Count time steps... */
2270 if ((++nh) >= 1000)
2271 ERRMSG("Too many data points!");
2272 }
2273
2274 /* Close file... */
2275 fclose(in);
2276
2277 /* Check number of data points... */
2278 ts->ntime = nh;
2279 if (nh < 2)
2280 ERRMSG("Not enough data points!");
2281
2282 /* Write info... */
2283 LOG(2, "Number of time steps: %d", ts->ntime);
2284 LOG(2, "Time steps: %.2f, %.2f ... %.2f s", ts->time[0], ts->time[1],
2285 ts->time[nh - 1]);
2286 LOG(2, "Volume mixing ratio range: %g ... %g ppv",
2287 gsl_stats_min(ts->vmr, 1, (size_t) nh), gsl_stats_max(ts->vmr, 1,
2288 (size_t) nh));
2289
2290 /* Exit success... */
2291 return 1;
2292}

void read_clim_zm ( const char *  filename,
char *  varname,
clim_zm_t *  zm

2299 {
2300
2301 int ncid, varid, it, iy, iz, iz2, nt;
2302
2303 double *help, varmin = 1e99, varmax = -1e99;
2304
2305 /* Write info... */
2306 LOG(1, "Read %s data: %s", varname, filename);
2307
2308 /* Open netCDF file... */
2309 if (nc_open(filename, NC_NOWRITE, &ncid) != NC_NOERR) {
2310 WARN("%s climatology data are missing!", varname);
2311 return;
2312 }
2313
2314 /* Read pressure data... */
2315 NC_INQ_DIM("press", &zm->np, 2, CP);
2316 NC_GET_DOUBLE("press", zm->p, 1);
2317 if (zm->p[0] < zm->p[1])
2318 ERRMSG("Pressure data are not descending!");
2319
2320 /* Read latitudes... */
2321 NC_INQ_DIM("lat", &zm->nlat, 2, CY);
2322 NC_GET_DOUBLE("lat", zm->lat, 1);
2323 if (zm->lat[0] > zm->lat[1])
2324 ERRMSG("Latitude data are not ascending!");
2325
2326 /* Set time data (for monthly means)... */
2327 zm->ntime = 12;
2328 zm->time[0] = 1209600.00;
2329 zm->time[1] = 3888000.00;
2330 zm->time[2] = 6393600.00;
2331 zm->time[3] = 9072000.00;
2332 zm->time[4] = 11664000.00;
2333 zm->time[5] = 14342400.00;
2334 zm->time[6] = 16934400.00;
2335 zm->time[7] = 19612800.00;
2336 zm->time[8] = 22291200.00;
2337 zm->time[9] = 24883200.00;
2338 zm->time[10] = 27561600.00;
2339 zm->time[11] = 30153600.00;
2340
2341 /* Check number of timesteps... */
2342 NC_INQ_DIM("time", &nt, 12, 12);
2343
2344 /* Read data... */
2345 ALLOC(help, double,
2346 zm->nlat * zm->np * zm->ntime);
2347 NC_GET_DOUBLE(varname, help, 1);
2348 for (it = 0; it < zm->ntime; it++)
2349 for (iz = 0; iz < zm->np; iz++)
2350 for (iy = 0; iy < zm->nlat; iy++)
2351 zm->vmr[it][iz][iy] = help[ARRAY_3D(it, iz, zm->np, iy, zm->nlat)];
2352 free(help);
2353
2354 /* Fix data gaps... */
2355 for (it = 0; it < zm->ntime; it++)
2356 for (iy = 0; iy < zm->nlat; iy++)
2357 for (iz = 0; iz < zm->np; iz++) {
2358 if (zm->vmr[it][iz][iy] < 0) {
2359 for (iz2 = 0; iz2 < zm->np; iz2++)
2360 if (zm->vmr[it][iz2][iy] >= 0) {
2361 zm->vmr[it][iz][iy] = zm->vmr[it][iz2][iy];
2362 break;
2363 }
2364 for (iz2 = zm->np - 1; iz2 >= 0; iz2--)
2365 if (zm->vmr[it][iz2][iy] >= 0) {
2366 zm->vmr[it][iz][iy] = zm->vmr[it][iz2][iy];
2367 break;
2368 }
2369 }
2370 varmin = GSL_MIN(varmin, zm->vmr[it][iz][iy]);
2371 varmax = GSL_MAX(varmax, zm->vmr[it][iz][iy]);
2372 }
2373
2374 /* Close netCDF file... */
2375 NC(nc_close(ncid));
2376
2377 /* Write info... */
2378 LOG(2, "Number of time steps: %d", zm->ntime);
2379 LOG(2, "Time steps: %.2f, %.2f ... %.2f s",
2380 zm->time[0], zm->time[1], zm->time[zm->ntime - 1]);
2381 LOG(2, "Number of pressure levels: %d", zm->np);
2382 LOG(2, "Altitude levels: %g, %g ... %g km",
2383 Z(zm->p[0]), Z(zm->p[1]), Z(zm->p[zm->np - 1]));
2384 LOG(2, "Pressure levels: %g, %g ... %g hPa", zm->p[0],
2385 zm->p[1], zm->p[zm->np - 1]);
2386 LOG(2, "Number of latitudes: %d", zm->nlat);
2387 LOG(2, "Latitudes: %g, %g ... %g deg",
2388 zm->lat[0], zm->lat[1], zm->lat[zm->nlat - 1]);
2389 LOG(2, "%s volume mixing ratio range: %g ... %g ppv", varname, varmin,
2390 varmax);
2391}

2602 SET_QNT(qnt_Cccl2f2, "Cccl2f2", "CCl2F2 (CFC-12) volume mixing ratio",
2603 "ppv")
2604 SET_QNT(qnt_Cn2o, "Cn2o", "N2O volume mixing ratio", "ppv")
2605 SET_QNT(qnt_Csf6, "Csf6", "SF6 volume mixing ratio", "ppv")
2606 SET_QNT(qnt_aoa, "aoa", "age of air", "s")
2607 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "QNT_UNIT", iq, "", ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
2608 }
2609
2610 /* Vertical coordinates and velocities... */
2611 ctl->vert_coord_ap =
2612 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VERT_COORD_AP", -1, "0", NULL);
2613 ctl->vert_coord_met =
2614 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VERT_COORD_MET", -1, "0", NULL);
2615 if (ctl->vert_coord_ap == 1) {
2616 int error = 1;
2617 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
2618 if (strcmp(ctl->qnt_name[iq], "zeta") == 0) {
2619 error = 0;
2620 break;
2621 }
2622 }
2623 if (error == 1)
2624 ERRMSG("Please add zeta to your quantities for diabatic calculations.");
2625 }
2626 ctl->clams_met_data =
2627 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLAMS_MET_DATA", -1, "0", NULL);
2628 ctl->cpl_zeta_and_press_modules =
2629 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CPL_ZETA_PRESS_MODULES", -1, "1",
2630 NULL);
2631
2632 /* Time steps of simulation... */
2633 ctl->direction =
2634 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DIRECTION", -1, "1", NULL);
2635 if (ctl->direction != -1 && ctl->direction != 1)
2636 ERRMSG("Set DIRECTION to -1 or 1!");
2637 ctl->t_stop = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "T_STOP", -1, "1e100", NULL);
2638 ctl->dt_mod = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DT_MOD", -1, "180", NULL);
2639
2640 /* Meteo data... */
2641 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "METBASE", -1, "-", ctl->metbase);
2642 ctl->dt_met = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DT_MET", -1, "3600", NULL);
2643 ctl->met_convention =
2644 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_CONVENTION", -1, "0", NULL);
2645 ctl->met_type =
2646 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_TYPE", -1, "0", NULL);
2647 if (ctl->vert_coord_ap == 1 && ctl->met_type != 0)
2648 ERRMSG
2649 ("Please use meteorological files in netcdf format for diabatic calculations.");
2650 ctl->met_nc_scale =
2651 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_NC_SCALE", -1, "1", NULL);
2652 ctl->met_zfp_prec =
2653 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_ZFP_PREC", -1, "8", NULL);
2654 ctl->met_zfp_tol_t =
2655 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_ZFP_TOL_T", -1, "5.0", NULL);
2656 ctl->met_zfp_tol_z =
2657 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_ZFP_TOL_Z", -1, "0.5", NULL);
2658 ctl->met_dx = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_DX", -1, "1", NULL);
2659 ctl->met_dy = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_DY", -1, "1", NULL);
2660 ctl->met_dp = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_DP", -1, "1", NULL);
2661 if (ctl->met_dx < 1 || ctl->met_dy < 1 || ctl->met_dp < 1)
2662 ERRMSG("MET_DX, MET_DY, and MET_DP need to be greater than zero!");
2663 ctl->met_sx = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_SX", -1, "1", NULL);
2664 ctl->met_sy = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_SY", -1, "1", NULL);
2665 ctl->met_sp = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_SP", -1, "1", NULL);
2666 if (ctl->met_sx < 1 || ctl->met_sy < 1 || ctl->met_sp < 1)
2667 ERRMSG("MET_SX, MET_SY, and MET_SP need to be greater than zero!");
2668 ctl->met_detrend =
2669 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_DETREND", -1, "-999", NULL);
2670 ctl->met_np = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_NP", -1, "0", NULL);
2671 if (ctl->met_np > EP)
2672 ERRMSG("Too many levels!");
2673 ctl->press_level_def =
2674 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PRESS_LEVEL_DEF", -1, "-1", NULL);
2675 if (ctl->press_level_def >= 0) {
2676 level_definitions(ctl);
2677 } else {
2678 if (ctl->met_np > 0) {
2679 for (int ip = 0; ip < ctl->met_np; ip++)
2680 ctl->met_p[ip] =
2681 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_P", ip, "", NULL);
2682 }
2683 }
2684 ctl->met_geopot_sx
2685 = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_GEOPOT_SX", -1, "-1", NULL);
2686 ctl->met_geopot_sy
2687 = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_GEOPOT_SY", -1, "-1", NULL);
2688 ctl->met_relhum
2689 = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_RELHUM", -1, "0", NULL);
2690 ctl->met_tropo =
2691 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_TROPO", -1, "3", NULL);
2692 if (ctl->met_tropo < 0 || ctl->met_tropo > 5)
2693 ERRMSG("Set MET_TROPO = 0 ... 5!");
2694 ctl->met_tropo_pv =
2695 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_TROPO_PV", -1, "3.5", NULL);
2696 ctl->met_tropo_theta =
2697 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_TROPO_THETA", -1, "380", NULL);
2698 ctl->met_tropo_spline =
2699 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_TROPO_SPLINE", -1, "1", NULL);
2700 ctl->met_cloud =
2701 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_CLOUD", -1, "1", NULL);
2702 if (ctl->met_cloud < 0 || ctl->met_cloud > 3)
2703 ERRMSG("Set MET_CLOUD = 0 ... 3!");
2704 ctl->met_cloud_min =
2705 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_CLOUD_MIN", -1, "0", NULL);
2706 ctl->met_dt_out =
2707 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_DT_OUT", -1, "0.1", NULL);
2708 ctl->met_cache =
2709 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MET_CACHE", -1, "0", NULL);
2710
2711 /* Sorting... */
2712 ctl->sort_dt = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SORT_DT", -1, "-999", NULL);
2713
2714 /* Isosurface parameters... */
2715 ctl->isosurf =
2716 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ISOSURF", -1, "0", NULL);
2717 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BALLOON", -1, "-", ctl->balloon);
2718
2719 /* Random number generator... */
2720 ctl->rng_type =
2721 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "RNG_TYPE", -1, "0", NULL);
2722 if (ctl->rng_type < 0 || ctl->rng_type > 2)
2723 ERRMSG("Set RNG_TYPE to 0, 1, or 2!");
2724
2725 /* Advection parameters... */
2726 ctl->advect = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ADVECT", -1, "2", NULL);
2727 if (!(ctl->advect == 0 || ctl->advect == 1
2728 || ctl->advect == 2 || ctl->advect == 4))
2729 ERRMSG("Set ADVECT to 0, 1, 2, or 4!");
2730 ctl->reflect =
2731 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "REFLECT", -1, "0", NULL);
2732
2733 /* Diffusion parameters... */
2734 ctl->turb_dx_trop =
2735 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_DX_TROP", -1, "50", NULL);
2736 ctl->turb_dx_strat =
2737 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_DX_STRAT", -1, "0", NULL);
2738 ctl->turb_dz_trop =
2739 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_DZ_TROP", -1, "0", NULL);
2740 ctl->turb_dz_strat =
2741 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_DZ_STRAT", -1, "0.1", NULL);
2742 ctl->turb_mesox =
2743 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_MESOX", -1, "0.16", NULL);
2744 ctl->turb_mesoz =
2745 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TURB_MESOZ", -1, "0.16", NULL);
2746
2747 /* Convection... */
2748 ctl->conv_cape
2749 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CONV_CAPE", -1, "-999", NULL);
2750 ctl->conv_cin
2751 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CONV_CIN", -1, "-999", NULL);
2752 ctl->conv_dt = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CONV_DT", -1, "-999", NULL);
2753 ctl->conv_mix_bot
2754 = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CONV_MIX_BOT", -1, "1", NULL);
2755 ctl->conv_mix_top
2756 = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CONV_MIX_TOP", -1, "1", NULL);
2757
2758 /* Boundary conditions... */
2759 ctl->bound_mass =
2760 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_MASS", -1, "-999", NULL);
2761 ctl->bound_mass_trend =
2762 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_MASS_TREND", -1, "0", NULL);
2763 ctl->bound_vmr =
2764 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_VMR", -1, "-999", NULL);
2765 ctl->bound_vmr_trend =
2766 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_VMR_TREND", -1, "0", NULL);
2767 ctl->bound_lat0 =
2768 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_LAT0", -1, "-999", NULL);
2769 ctl->bound_lat1 =
2770 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_LAT1", -1, "-999", NULL);
2771 ctl->bound_p0 =
2772 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_P0", -1, "-999", NULL);
2773 ctl->bound_p1 =
2774 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_P1", -1, "-999", NULL);
2775 ctl->bound_dps =
2776 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_DPS", -1, "-999", NULL);
2777 ctl->bound_dzs =
2778 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_DZS", -1, "-999", NULL);
2779 ctl->bound_zetas =
2780 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_ZETAS", -1, "-999", NULL);
2781 ctl->bound_pbl =
2782 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "BOUND_PBL", -1, "0", NULL);
2783
2784 /* Species parameters... */
2785 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SPECIES", -1, "-", ctl->species);
2786 if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "CF2Cl2") == 0) {
2787 ctl->molmass = 120.907;
2788 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 3e-5;
2789 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 3500.0;
2790 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "CFCl3") == 0) {
2791 ctl->molmass = 137.359;
2792 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1.1e-4;
2793 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 3300.0;
2794 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "CH4") == 0) {
2795 ctl->molmass = 16.043;
2796 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 2;
2797 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 2.45e-12;
2798 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 1775;
2799 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1.4e-5;
2800 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 1600.0;
2801 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "CO") == 0) {
2802 ctl->molmass = 28.01;
2803 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 3;
2804 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 6.9e-33;
2805 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 2.1;
2806 ctl->oh_chem[2] = 1.1e-12;
2807 ctl->oh_chem[3] = -1.3;
2808 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 9.7e-6;
2809 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 1300.0;
2810 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "CO2") == 0) {
2811 ctl->molmass = 44.009;
2812 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 3.3e-4;
2813 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 2400.0;
2814 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "H2O") == 0) {
2815 ctl->molmass = 18.01528;
2816 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "N2O") == 0) {
2817 ctl->molmass = 44.013;
2818 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 2.4e-4;
2819 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 2600.;
2820 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "NH3") == 0) {
2821 ctl->molmass = 17.031;
2822 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 2;
2823 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 1.7e-12;
2824 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 710;
2825 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 5.9e-1;
2826 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 4200.0;
2827 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "HNO3") == 0) {
2828 ctl->molmass = 63.012;
2829 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 2.1e3;
2830 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 8700.0;
2831 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "NO") == 0) {
2832 ctl->molmass = 30.006;
2833 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 3;
2834 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 7.1e-31;
2835 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 2.6;
2836 ctl->oh_chem[2] = 3.6e-11;
2837 ctl->oh_chem[3] = 0.1;
2838 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1.9e-5;
2839 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 1600.0;
2840 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "NO2") == 0) {
2841 ctl->molmass = 46.005;
2842 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 3;
2843 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 1.8e-30;
2844 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 3.0;
2845 ctl->oh_chem[2] = 2.8e-11;
2846 ctl->oh_chem[3] = 0.0;
2847 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1.2e-4;
2848 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 2400.0;
2849 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "O3") == 0) {
2850 ctl->molmass = 47.997;
2851 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 2;
2852 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 1.7e-12;
2853 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 940;
2854 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1e-4;
2855 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 2800.0;
2856 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "SF6") == 0) {
2857 ctl->molmass = 146.048;
2858 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 2.4e-6;
2859 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 3100.0;
2860 } else if (strcasecmp(ctl->species, "SO2") == 0) {
2861 ctl->molmass = 64.066;
2862 ctl->oh_chem_reaction = 3;
2863 ctl->oh_chem[0] = 2.9e-31;
2864 ctl->oh_chem[1] = 4.1;
2865 ctl->oh_chem[2] = 1.7e-12;
2866 ctl->oh_chem[3] = -0.2;
2867 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[0] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[0] = 1.3e-2;
2868 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[1] = ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[1] = 2900.0;
2869 }
2870
2871 /* Molar mass... */
2872 char defstr[LEN];
2873 sprintf(defstr, "%g", ctl->molmass);
2874 ctl->molmass = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MOLMASS", -1, defstr, NULL);
2875
2876 /* OH chemistry... */
2877 sprintf(defstr, "%d", ctl->oh_chem_reaction);
2878 ctl->oh_chem_reaction =
2879 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "OH_CHEM_REACTION", -1, defstr,
2880 NULL);
2881 for (int ip = 0; ip < 4; ip++) {
2882 sprintf(defstr, "%g", ctl->oh_chem[ip]);
2883 ctl->oh_chem[ip] =
2884 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "OH_CHEM", ip, defstr, NULL);
2885 }
2886 ctl->oh_chem_beta =
2887 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "OH_CHEM_BETA", -1, "0", NULL);
2888
2889 /* H2O2 chemistry... */
2890 ctl->h2o2_chem_reaction =
2891 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "H2O2_CHEM_REACTION", -1, "0", NULL);
2892
2893 /* KPP chemistry... */
2894 ctl->kpp_chem =
2895 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "KPP_CHEM", -1, "0", NULL);
2896 ctl->dt_kpp = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DT_KPP", -1, "1800", NULL);
2897
2898 /* First order tracer chemistry... */
2899 ctl->tracer_chem =
2900 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TRACER_CHEM", -1, "0", NULL);
2901
2902 /* Wet deposition... */
2903 for (int ip = 0; ip < 3; ip++) {
2904 sprintf(defstr, "%g", ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[ip]);
2905 ctl->wet_depo_ic_h[ip] =
2906 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_IC_H", ip, defstr, NULL);
2907 }
2908 for (int ip = 0; ip < 1; ip++) {
2909 sprintf(defstr, "%g", ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[ip]);
2910 ctl->wet_depo_bc_h[ip] =
2911 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_BC_H", ip, defstr, NULL);
2912 }
2913 ctl->wet_depo_ic_a =
2914 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_IC_A", -1, "0", NULL);
2915 ctl->wet_depo_ic_b =
2916 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_IC_B", -1, "0", NULL);
2917 ctl->wet_depo_bc_a =
2918 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_BC_A", -1, "0", NULL);
2919 ctl->wet_depo_bc_b =
2920 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_BC_B", -1, "0", NULL);
2921 ctl->wet_depo_pre[0] =
2922 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_PRE", 0, "0.5", NULL);
2923 ctl->wet_depo_pre[1] =
2924 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_PRE", 1, "0.36", NULL);
2925 ctl->wet_depo_ic_ret_ratio =
2926 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_IC_RET_RATIO", -1, "1", NULL);
2927 ctl->wet_depo_bc_ret_ratio =
2928 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "WET_DEPO_BC_RET_RATIO", -1, "1", NULL);
2929
2930 /* Dry deposition... */
2931 ctl->dry_depo_vdep =
2932 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DRY_DEPO_VDEP", -1, "0", NULL);
2933 ctl->dry_depo_dp =
2934 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "DRY_DEPO_DP", -1, "30", NULL);
2935
2936 /* Climatological data... */
2937 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_PHOTO", -1,
2938 "../../data/clams_photolysis_rates.nc", ctl->clim_photo);
2939 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_HNO3_FILENAME", -1,
2940 "../../data/gozcards_HNO3.nc", ctl->clim_hno3_filename);
2941 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_OH_FILENAME", -1,
2942 "../../data/clams_radical_species_vmr.nc", ctl->clim_oh_filename);
2943 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_H2O2_FILENAME", -1,
2944 "../../data/cams_H2O2.nc", ctl->clim_h2o2_filename);
2945 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_HO2_FILENAME", -1,
2946 "../../data/clams_radical_species_vmr.nc", ctl->clim_ho2_filename);
2947 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_O1D_FILENAME", -1,
2948 "../../data/clams_radical_species_vmr.nc", ctl->clim_o1d_filename);
2949 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_CCL4_TIMESERIES", -1,
2950 "../../data/noaa_gml_ccl4.tab", ctl->clim_ccl4_timeseries);
2951 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_CCL3F_TIMESERIES", -1,
2952 "../../data/noaa_gml_cfc11.tab", ctl->clim_ccl3f_timeseries);
2953 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_CCL2F2_TIMESERIES", -1,
2954 "../../data/noaa_gml_cfc12.tab", ctl->clim_ccl2f2_timeseries);
2955 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_N2O_TIMESERIES", -1,
2956 "../../data/noaa_gml_n2o.tab", ctl->clim_n2o_timeseries);
2957 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CLIM_SF6_TIMESERIES", -1,
2958 "../../data/noaa_gml_sf6.tab", ctl->clim_sf6_timeseries);
2959
2960 /* Mixing... */
2961 ctl->mixing_dt =
2962 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_DT", -1, "3600.", NULL);
2963 ctl->mixing_trop =
2964 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_TROP", -1, "-999", NULL);
2965 ctl->mixing_strat =
2966 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_STRAT", -1, "-999", NULL);
2967 ctl->mixing_z0 =
2968 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_Z0", -1, "-5", NULL);
2969 ctl->mixing_z1 =
2970 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_Z1", -1, "85", NULL);
2971 ctl->mixing_nz =
2972 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_NZ", -1, "90", NULL);
2973 ctl->mixing_lon0 =
2974 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_LON0", -1, "-180", NULL);
2975 ctl->mixing_lon1 =
2976 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_LON1", -1, "180", NULL);
2977 ctl->mixing_nx =
2978 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_NX", -1, "360", NULL);
2979 ctl->mixing_lat0 =
2980 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_LAT0", -1, "-90", NULL);
2981 ctl->mixing_lat1 =
2982 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_LAT1", -1, "90", NULL);
2983 ctl->mixing_ny =
2984 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "MIXING_NY", -1, "180", NULL);
2985
2986 /* Chemistry grid... */
2987 ctl->chemgrid_z0 =
2988 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_Z0", -1, "-5", NULL);
2989 ctl->chemgrid_z1 =
2990 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_Z1", -1, "85", NULL);
2991 ctl->chemgrid_nz =
2992 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_NZ", -1, "90", NULL);
2993 ctl->chemgrid_lon0 =
2994 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_LON0", -1, "-180", NULL);
2995 ctl->chemgrid_lon1 =
2996 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_LON1", -1, "180", NULL);
2997 ctl->chemgrid_nx =
2998 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_NX", -1, "360", NULL);
2999 ctl->chemgrid_lat0 =
3000 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_LAT0", -1, "-90", NULL);
3001 ctl->chemgrid_lat1 =
3002 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_LAT1", -1, "90", NULL);
3003 ctl->chemgrid_ny =
3004 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CHEMGRID_NY", -1, "180", NULL);
3005
3006 /* Exponential decay... */
3007 ctl->tdec_trop = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TDEC_TROP", -1, "0", NULL);
3008 ctl->tdec_strat
3009 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "TDEC_STRAT", -1, "0", NULL);
3010
3011 /* PSC analysis... */
3012 ctl->psc_h2o = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PSC_H2O", -1, "4e-6", NULL);
3013 ctl->psc_hno3 =
3014 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PSC_HNO3", -1, "9e-9", NULL);
3015
3016 /* Output of atmospheric data... */
3017 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_BASENAME", -1, "-", ctl->atm_basename);
3018 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_GPFILE", -1, "-", ctl->atm_gpfile);
3019 ctl->atm_dt_out =
3020 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_DT_OUT", -1, "86400", NULL);
3021 ctl->atm_filter =
3022 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_FILTER", -1, "0", NULL);
3023 ctl->atm_stride =
3024 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_STRIDE", -1, "1", NULL);
3025 ctl->atm_type =
3026 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_TYPE", -1, "0", NULL);
3027 ctl->atm_type_out =
3028 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ATM_TYPE_OUT", -1, "-1", NULL);
3029 if (ctl->atm_type_out == -1)
3030 ctl->atm_type_out = ctl->atm_type;
3031 ctl->obs_type =
3032 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "OBS_TYPE", -1, "0", NULL);
3033
3034 /* Output of CSI data... */
3035 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_BASENAME", -1, "-", ctl->csi_basename);
3036 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_KERNEL", -1, "-", ctl->csi_kernel);
3037 ctl->csi_dt_out =
3038 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_DT_OUT", -1, "86400", NULL);
3039 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_OBSFILE", -1, "-", ctl->csi_obsfile);
3040 ctl->csi_obsmin =
3041 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_OBSMIN", -1, "0", NULL);
3042 ctl->csi_modmin =
3043 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_MODMIN", -1, "0", NULL);
3044 ctl->csi_z0 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_Z0", -1, "-5", NULL);
3045 ctl->csi_z1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_Z1", -1, "85", NULL);
3046 ctl->csi_nz = (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_NZ", -1, "1", NULL);
3047 ctl->csi_lon0 =
3048 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_LON0", -1, "-180", NULL);
3049 ctl->csi_lon1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_LON1", -1, "180", NULL);
3050 ctl->csi_nx =
3051 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_NX", -1, "360", NULL);
3052 ctl->csi_lat0 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_LAT0", -1, "-90", NULL);
3053 ctl->csi_lat1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_LAT1", -1, "90", NULL);
3054 ctl->csi_ny =
3055 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "CSI_NY", -1, "180", NULL);
3056
3057 /* Output of ensemble data... */
3058 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ENS_BASENAME", -1, "-", ctl->ens_basename);
3059 ctl->ens_dt_out =
3060 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "ENS_DT_OUT", -1, "86400", NULL);
3061
3062 /* Output of grid data... */
3063 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_BASENAME", -1, "-",
3064 ctl->grid_basename);
3065 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_KERNEL", -1, "-", ctl->grid_kernel);
3066 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_GPFILE", -1, "-", ctl->grid_gpfile);
3067 ctl->grid_dt_out =
3068 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_DT_OUT", -1, "86400", NULL);
3069 ctl->grid_sparse =
3070 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_SPARSE", -1, "0", NULL);
3071 ctl->grid_stddev =
3072 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_STDDEV", -1, "0", NULL);
3073 ctl->grid_z0 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_Z0", -1, "-5", NULL);
3074 ctl->grid_z1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_Z1", -1, "85", NULL);
3075 ctl->grid_nz =
3076 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_NZ", -1, "1", NULL);
3077 ctl->grid_lon0 =
3078 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_LON0", -1, "-180", NULL);
3079 ctl->grid_lon1 =
3080 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_LON1", -1, "180", NULL);
3081 ctl->grid_nx =
3082 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_NX", -1, "360", NULL);
3083 ctl->grid_lat0 =
3084 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_LAT0", -1, "-90", NULL);
3085 ctl->grid_lat1 =
3086 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_LAT1", -1, "90", NULL);
3087 ctl->grid_ny =
3088 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_NY", -1, "180", NULL);
3089 ctl->grid_type =
3090 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "GRID_TYPE", -1, "0", NULL);
3091
3092 /* Output of profile data... */
3093 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_BASENAME", -1, "-",
3094 ctl->prof_basename);
3095 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_OBSFILE", -1, "-", ctl->prof_obsfile);
3096 ctl->prof_z0 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_Z0", -1, "0", NULL);
3097 ctl->prof_z1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_Z1", -1, "60", NULL);
3098 ctl->prof_nz =
3099 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_NZ", -1, "60", NULL);
3100 ctl->prof_lon0 =
3101 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_LON0", -1, "-180", NULL);
3102 ctl->prof_lon1 =
3103 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_LON1", -1, "180", NULL);
3104 ctl->prof_nx =
3105 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_NX", -1, "360", NULL);
3106 ctl->prof_lat0 =
3107 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_LAT0", -1, "-90", NULL);
3108 ctl->prof_lat1 =
3109 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_LAT1", -1, "90", NULL);
3110 ctl->prof_ny =
3111 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "PROF_NY", -1, "180", NULL);
3112
3113 /* Output of sample data... */
3114 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SAMPLE_BASENAME", -1, "-",
3115 ctl->sample_basename);
3116 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SAMPLE_KERNEL", -1, "-",
3117 ctl->sample_kernel);
3118 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SAMPLE_OBSFILE", -1, "-",
3119 ctl->sample_obsfile);
3120 ctl->sample_dx =
3121 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SAMPLE_DX", -1, "50", NULL);
3122 ctl->sample_dz =
3123 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "SAMPLE_DZ", -1, "-999", NULL);
3124
3125 /* Output of station data... */
3126 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_BASENAME", -1, "-",
3127 ctl->stat_basename);
3128 ctl->stat_lon = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_LON", -1, "0", NULL);
3129 ctl->stat_lat = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_LAT", -1, "0", NULL);
3130 ctl->stat_r = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_R", -1, "50", NULL);
3131 ctl->stat_t0 =
3132 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_T0", -1, "-1e100", NULL);
3133 ctl->stat_t1 = scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "STAT_T1", -1, "1e100", NULL);
3134
3135 /* Output of VTK data... */
3136 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_BASENAME", -1, "-", ctl->vtk_basename);
3137 ctl->vtk_dt_out =
3138 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_DT_OUT", -1, "86400", NULL);
3139 ctl->vtk_stride =
3140 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_STRIDE", -1, "1", NULL);
3141 ctl->vtk_scale =
3142 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_SCALE", -1, "1.0", NULL);
3143 ctl->vtk_offset =
3144 scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_OFFSET", -1, "0.0", NULL);
3145 ctl->vtk_sphere =
3146 (int) scan_ctl(filename, argc, argv, "VTK_SPHERE", -1, "0", NULL);
3147}

void read_kernel ( const char *  filename,
double  kz[EP],
double  kw[EP],
int *  nk 
)

Read kernel data file.

Definition at line 3151 of file libtrac.c.

3155 {
3156
3157 /* Write info... */
3158 LOG(1, "Read kernel function: %s", filename);
3159
3160 /* Open file... */
3161 FILE *in;
3162 if (!(in = fopen(filename, "r")))
3163 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
3164
3165 /* Read data... */
3166 char line[LEN];
3167 int n = 0;
3168 while (fgets(line, LEN, in))
3169 if (sscanf(line, "%lg %lg", &kz[n], &kw[n]) == 2) {
3170 if (n > 0 && kz[n] < kz[n - 1])
3171 ERRMSG("Height levels must be ascending!");
3172 if ((++n) >= EP)
3173 ERRMSG("Too many height levels!");
3174 }
3175
3176 /* Close file... */
3177 fclose(in);
3178
3179 /* Check number of data points... */
3180 *nk = n;
3181 if (n < 2)
3182 ERRMSG("Not enough height levels!");
3183
3184 /* Normalize kernel function... */
3185 double kmax = gsl_stats_max(kw, 1, (size_t) n);
3186 for (int iz = 0; iz < n; iz++)
3187 kw[iz] /= kmax;
3188}

3196 {
3197

3203

3206 /* Open netCDF file... */

3208 WARN("Cannot open file!");

3210 }
3211
3212 /* Read coordinates of meteo data... */

3214

3216 read_met_levels(ncid, ctl, met);
3217

3219 read_met_extrapolate(met);
3220
3221 /* Read surface data... */
3222 read_met_surface(ncid, met, ctl);

3224 /* Fix polar winds... */
3225 read_met_polar_winds(met);

3228 read_met_periodic(met);
3229

3231 read_met_sample(ctl, met);

3233 /* Calculate geopotential heights... */

3249 read_met_cape(clim, met);
3250

3255 read_met_detrend(ctl, met);
3256

3282
3283 /* Check type of binary data... */
3284 int met_type;
3285 FREAD(&met_type, int,
3286 1,
3287 in);
3288 if (met_type != ctl->met_type)
3289 ERRMSG("Wrong MET_TYPE of binary data!");
3290
3291 /* Check version of binary data... */
3292 int version;
3293 FREAD(&version, int,
3294 1,
3295 in);
3296 if (version != 100 && version != 101)
3297 ERRMSG("Wrong version of binary data!");
3298
3299 /* Read time... */
3300 FREAD(&met->time, double,
3301 1,
3302 in);
3303 jsec2time(met->time, &year, &mon, &day, &hour, &min, &sec, &r);
3304 LOG(2, "Time: %.2f (%d-%02d-%02d, %02d:%02d UTC)",
3305 met->time, year, mon, day, hour, min);
3306 if (year < 1900 || year > 2100 || mon < 1 || mon > 12
3307 || day < 1 || day > 31 || hour < 0 || hour > 23)
3308 ERRMSG("Error while reading time!");
3309
3310 /* Read dimensions... */
3311 FREAD(&met->nx, int,
3312 1,
3313 in);
3314 LOG(2, "Number of longitudes: %d", met->nx);
3315 if (met->nx < 2 || met->nx > EX)
3316 ERRMSG("Number of longitudes out of range!");
3317
3318 FREAD(&met->ny, int,
3319 1,
3320 in);
3321 LOG(2, "Number of latitudes: %d", met->ny);
3322 if (met->ny < 2 || met->ny > EY)
3323 ERRMSG("Number of latitudes out of range!");
3324
3325 FREAD(&met->np, int,
3326 1,
3327 in);
3328 LOG(2, "Number of levels: %d", met->np);
3329 if (met->np < 2 || met->np > EP)
3330 ERRMSG("Number of levels out of range!");
3331
3332 /* Read grid... */
3333 FREAD(met->lon, double,
3334 (size_t) met->nx,
3335 in);
3336 LOG(2, "Longitudes: %g, %g ... %g deg",
3337 met->lon[0], met->lon[1], met->lon[met->nx - 1]);
3338
3339 FREAD(met->lat, double,
3340 (size_t) met->ny,
3341 in);
3342 LOG(2, "Latitudes: %g, %g ... %g deg",
3343 met->lat[0], met->lat[1], met->lat[met->ny - 1]);
3344
3345 FREAD(met->p, double,
3346 (size_t) met->np,
3347 in);
3348 LOG(2, "Altitude levels: %g, %g ... %g km",
3349 Z(met->p[0]), Z(met->p[1]), Z(met->p[met->np - 1]));
3350 LOG(2, "Pressure levels: %g, %g ... %g hPa",
3351 met->p[0], met->p[1], met->p[met->np - 1]);
3352
3353 /* Read surface data... */
3354 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->ps, "PS");
3355 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->ts, "TS");
3356 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->zs, "ZS");
3357 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->us, "US");
3358 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->vs, "VS");
3359 if (version == 101) {
3360 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->lsm, "LSM");
3361 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->sst, "SST");
3362 }
3363 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->pbl, "PBL");
3364 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->pt, "PT");
3365 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->tt, "TT");
3366 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->zt, "ZT");
3367 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->h2ot, "H2OT");
3368 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->pct, "PCT");
3369 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->pcb, "PCB");
3370 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->cl, "CL");
3371 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->plcl, "PLCL");
3372 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->plfc, "PLFC");
3373 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->pel, "PEL");
3374 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->cape, "CAPE");
3375 read_met_bin_2d(in, met, met->cin, "CIN");
3376
3377 /* Read level data... */
3378 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->z, "Z");
3379 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->t, "T");
3380 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->u, "U");
3381 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->v, "V");
3382 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->w, "W");
3383 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->pv, "PV");
3384 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->h2o, "H2O");
3385 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->o3, "O3");
3386 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->lwc, "LWC");
3387 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->iwc, "IWC");
3388 if (version == 101)
3389 read_met_bin_3d(in, ctl, met, met->cc, "CC");
3390
3391 /* Read final flag... */
3392 int final;
3393 FREAD(&final, int,
3394 1,
3395 in);
3396 if (final != 999)
3397 ERRMSG("Error while reading binary data!");
3398
3399 /* Close file... */
3400 fclose(in);
3401 }
3402
3403 /* Not implemented... */
3404 else
3405 ERRMSG("MET_TYPE not implemented!");
3406
3407 /* Copy wind data to cache... */
3408#ifdef UVW
3409#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3410 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3411 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
3412 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3413 met->uvw[ix][iy][ip][0] = met->u[ix][iy][ip];
3414 met->uvw[ix][iy][ip][1] = met->v[ix][iy][ip];
3415 met->uvw[ix][iy][ip][2] = met->w[ix][iy][ip];
3416 }
3417#endif
3418
3419 /* Return success... */
3420 return 1;
3421}

◆ read_met_cape()

void read_met_cape ( clim_t *  clim,
met_t *  met 
)

Calculate convective available potential energy.

Definition at line 3523 of file libtrac.c.

3525 {
3526
3527 /* Set timer... */
3528 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_CAPE", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
3529 LOG(2, "Calculate CAPE...");
3530
3531 /* Vertical spacing (about 100 m)... */
3532 const double pfac = 1.01439, dz0 = RI / MA / G0 * log(pfac);
3533
3534 /* Loop over columns... */
3535#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3536 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3537 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
3538
3539 /* Get potential temperature and water vapor at lowest 50 hPa... */
3540 int n = 0;
3541 double h2o = 0, t, theta = 0;
3542 double pbot = GSL_MIN(met->ps[ix][iy], met->p[0]);
3543 double ptop = pbot - 50.;
3544 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3545 if (met->p[ip] <= pbot) {
3546 theta += THETA(met->p[ip], met->t[ix][iy][ip]);
3547 h2o += met->h2o[ix][iy][ip];
3548 n++;
3549 }
3550 if (met->p[ip] < ptop && n > 0)
3551 break;
3552 }
3553 theta /= n;
3554 h2o /= n;
3555
3556 /* Cannot compute anything if water vapor is missing... */
3557 met->plcl[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3558 met->plfc[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3559 met->pel[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3560 met->cape[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3561 met->cin[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3562 if (h2o <= 0)
3563 continue;
3564
3565 /* Find lifted condensation level (LCL)... */
3566 ptop = P(20.);
3567 pbot = met->ps[ix][iy];
3568 do {
3569 met->plcl[ix][iy] = (float) (0.5 * (pbot + ptop));
3570 t = theta / pow(1000. / met->plcl[ix][iy], 0.286);
3571 if (RH(met->plcl[ix][iy], t, h2o) > 100.)
3572 ptop = met->plcl[ix][iy];
3573 else
3574 pbot = met->plcl[ix][iy];
3575 } while (pbot - ptop > 0.1);
3576
3577 /* Calculate CIN up to LCL... */
3578 INTPOL_INIT;
3579 double dcape, dz, h2o_env, t_env;
3580 double p = met->ps[ix][iy];
3581 met->cape[ix][iy] = met->cin[ix][iy] = 0;
3582 do {
3583 dz = dz0 * TVIRT(t, h2o);
3584 p /= pfac;
3585 t = theta / pow(1000. / p, 0.286);
3586 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->t, p, met->lon[ix], met->lat[iy],
3587 &t_env, ci, cw, 1);
3588 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->h2o, p, met->lon[ix], met->lat[iy],
3589 &h2o_env, ci, cw, 0);
3590 dcape = 1e3 * G0 * (TVIRT(t, h2o) - TVIRT(t_env, h2o_env)) /
3591 TVIRT(t_env, h2o_env) * dz;
3592 if (dcape < 0)
3593 met->cin[ix][iy] += fabsf((float) dcape);
3594 } while (p > met->plcl[ix][iy]);
3595
3596 /* Calculate level of free convection (LFC), equilibrium level (EL),
3597 and convective available potential energy (CAPE)... */
3598 dcape = 0;
3599 p = met->plcl[ix][iy];
3600 t = theta / pow(1000. / p, 0.286);
3601 ptop = 0.75 * clim_tropo(clim, met->time, met->lat[iy]);
3602 do {
3603 dz = dz0 * TVIRT(t, h2o);
3604 p /= pfac;
3605 t -= lapse_rate(t, h2o) * dz;
3606 double psat = PSAT(t);
3607 h2o = psat / (p - (1. - EPS) * psat);
3608 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->t, p, met->lon[ix], met->lat[iy],
3609 &t_env, ci, cw, 1);
3610 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->h2o, p, met->lon[ix], met->lat[iy],
3611 &h2o_env, ci, cw, 0);
3612 double dcape_old = dcape;
3613 dcape = 1e3 * G0 * (TVIRT(t, h2o) - TVIRT(t_env, h2o_env)) /
3614 TVIRT(t_env, h2o_env) * dz;
3615 if (dcape > 0) {
3616 met->cape[ix][iy] += (float) dcape;
3617 if (!isfinite(met->plfc[ix][iy]))
3618 met->plfc[ix][iy] = (float) p;
3619 } else if (dcape_old > 0)
3620 met->pel[ix][iy] = (float) p;
3621 if (dcape < 0 && !isfinite(met->plfc[ix][iy]))
3622 met->cin[ix][iy] += fabsf((float) dcape);
3623 } while (p > ptop);
3624
3625 /* Check results... */
3626 if (!isfinite(met->plfc[ix][iy]))
3627 met->cin[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3628 }
3629}

3635 {
3636
3637 /* Set timer... */
3638 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_CLOUD", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
3639 LOG(2, "Calculate cloud data...");
3640
3641 /* Loop over columns... */
3642#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3643 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3644 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
3645
3646 /* Init... */
3647 met->pct[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3648 met->pcb[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
3649 met->cl[ix][iy] = 0;
3650
3651 /* Loop over pressure levels... */
3652 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np - 1; ip++) {
3653
3654 /* Check pressure... */
3655 if (met->p[ip] > met->ps[ix][iy] || met->p[ip] < P(20.))
3656 continue;
3657
3658 /* Check ice water and liquid water content... */
3659 if (met->iwc[ix][iy][ip] > ctl->met_cloud_min
3660 || met->lwc[ix][iy][ip] > ctl->met_cloud_min) {
3661
3662 /* Get cloud top pressure ... */
3663 met->pct[ix][iy]
3664 = (float) (0.5 * (met->p[ip] + (float) met->p[ip + 1]));
3665
3666 /* Get cloud bottom pressure ... */
3667 if (!isfinite(met->pcb[ix][iy]))
3668 met->pcb[ix][iy]
3669 = (float) (0.5 * (met->p[ip] + met->p[GSL_MAX(ip - 1, 0)]));
3670 }
3671
3672 /* Get cloud water... */
3673 met->cl[ix][iy] += (float)
3674 (0.5 * (met->iwc[ix][iy][ip] + met->iwc[ix][iy][ip + 1]
3675 + met->lwc[ix][iy][ip] + met->lwc[ix][iy][ip + 1])
3676 * 100. * (met->p[ip] - met->p[ip + 1]) / G0);
3677 }
3678 }
3679}

void read_met_detrend ( ctl_t *  ctl,
met_t *  met

3685 {
3686
3687 met_t *help;
3688
3689 /* Check parameters... */
3690 if (ctl->met_detrend <= 0)
3691 return;
3692
3693 /* Set timer... */
3694 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_DETREND", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
3695 LOG(2, "Detrend meteo data...");
3696
3697 /* Allocate... */
3698 ALLOC(help, met_t, 1);
3699
3700 /* Calculate standard deviation... */
3701 double sigma = ctl->met_detrend / 2.355;
3702 double tssq = 2. * SQR(sigma);
3703
3704 /* Calculate box size in latitude... */
3705 int sy = (int) (3. * DY2DEG(sigma) / fabs(met->lat[1] - met->lat[0]));
3706 sy = GSL_MIN(GSL_MAX(1, sy), met->ny / 2);
3707
3708 /* Calculate background... */
3709#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3710 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++) {
3711 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
3712
3713 /* Calculate Cartesian coordinates... */
3714 double x0[3];
3715 geo2cart(0.0, met->lon[ix], met->lat[iy], x0);
3716
3717 /* Calculate box size in longitude... */
3718 int sx =
3719 (int) (3. * DX2DEG(sigma, met->lat[iy]) /
3720 fabs(met->lon[1] - met->lon[0]));
3721 sx = GSL_MIN(GSL_MAX(1, sx), met->nx / 2);
3722
3723 /* Init... */
3724 float wsum = 0;
3725 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3726 help->t[ix][iy][ip] = 0;
3727 help->u[ix][iy][ip] = 0;
3728 help->v[ix][iy][ip] = 0;
3729 help->w[ix][iy][ip] = 0;
3730 }
3731
3732 /* Loop over neighboring grid points... */
3733 for (int ix2 = ix - sx; ix2 <= ix + sx; ix2++) {
3734 int ix3 = ix2;
3735 if (ix3 < 0)
3736 ix3 += met->nx;
3737 else if (ix3 >= met->nx)
3738 ix3 -= met->nx;
3739 for (int iy2 = GSL_MAX(iy - sy, 0);
3740 iy2 <= GSL_MIN(iy + sy, met->ny - 1); iy2++) {
3741
3742 /* Calculate Cartesian coordinates... */
3743 double x1[3];
3744 geo2cart(0.0, met->lon[ix3], met->lat[iy2], x1);
3745
3746 /* Calculate weighting factor... */
3747 float w = (float) exp(-DIST2(x0, x1) / tssq);
3748
3749 /* Add data... */
3750 wsum += w;
3751 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3752 help->t[ix][iy][ip] += w * met->t[ix3][iy2][ip];
3753 help->u[ix][iy][ip] += w * met->u[ix3][iy2][ip];
3754 help->v[ix][iy][ip] += w * met->v[ix3][iy2][ip];
3755 help->w[ix][iy][ip] += w * met->w[ix3][iy2][ip];
3756 }
3757 }
3758 }
3759
3760 /* Normalize... */
3761 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3762 help->t[ix][iy][ip] /= wsum;
3763 help->u[ix][iy][ip] /= wsum;
3764 help->v[ix][iy][ip] /= wsum;
3765 help->w[ix][iy][ip] /= wsum;
3766 }
3767 }
3768 }
3769
3770 /* Subtract background... */
3771#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(3)
3772 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3773 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
3774 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
3775 met->t[ix][iy][ip] -= help->t[ix][iy][ip];
3776 met->u[ix][iy][ip] -= help->u[ix][iy][ip];
3777 met->v[ix][iy][ip] -= help->v[ix][iy][ip];
3778 met->w[ix][iy][ip] -= help->w[ix][iy][ip];
3779 }
3780
3781 /* Free... */
3782 free(help);
3783}

void read_met_geopot ( ctl_t *  ctl,

3827 {
3828
3829 static float help[EP][EX][EY];
3830
3831 double logp[EP];
3832
3833 int dx = ctl->met_geopot_sx, dy = ctl->met_geopot_sy;
3834
3835 /* Set timer... */
3836 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_GEOPOT", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
3837 LOG(2, "Calculate geopotential heights...");
3838
3839 /* Calculate log pressure... */
3840#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
3841 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
3842 logp[ip] = log(met->p[ip]);
3843
3844 /* Apply hydrostatic equation to calculate geopotential heights... */
3845#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3846 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3847 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
3848
3849 /* Get surface height and pressure... */
3850 double zs = met->zs[ix][iy];
3851 double lnps = log(met->ps[ix][iy]);
3852
3853 /* Get temperature and water vapor at the surface... */
3854 int ip0 = locate_irr(met->p, met->np, met->ps[ix][iy]);
3855 double ts = LIN(met->p[ip0], met->t[ix][iy][ip0], met->p[ip0 + 1],
3856 met->t[ix][iy][ip0 + 1], met->ps[ix][iy]);
3857 double h2os = LIN(met->p[ip0], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip0], met->p[ip0 + 1],
3858 met->h2o[ix][iy][ip0 + 1], met->ps[ix][iy]);
3859
3860 /* Upper part of profile... */
3861 met->z[ix][iy][ip0 + 1]
3862 = (float) (zs +
3863 ZDIFF(lnps, ts, h2os, logp[ip0 + 1],
3864 met->t[ix][iy][ip0 + 1], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip0 + 1]));
3865 for (int ip = ip0 + 2; ip < met->np; ip++)
3866 met->z[ix][iy][ip]
3867 = (float) (met->z[ix][iy][ip - 1] +
3868 ZDIFF(logp[ip - 1], met->t[ix][iy][ip - 1],
3869 met->h2o[ix][iy][ip - 1], logp[ip],
3870 met->t[ix][iy][ip], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip]));
3871
3872 /* Lower part of profile... */
3873 met->z[ix][iy][ip0]
3874 = (float) (zs +
3875 ZDIFF(lnps, ts, h2os, logp[ip0],
3876 met->t[ix][iy][ip0], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip0]));
3877 for (int ip = ip0 - 1; ip >= 0; ip--)
3878 met->z[ix][iy][ip]
3879 = (float) (met->z[ix][iy][ip + 1] +
3880 ZDIFF(logp[ip + 1], met->t[ix][iy][ip + 1],
3881 met->h2o[ix][iy][ip + 1], logp[ip],
3882 met->t[ix][iy][ip], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip]));
3883 }
3884
3885 /* Check control parameters... */
3886 if (dx == 0 || dy == 0)
3887 return;
3888
3889 /* Default smoothing parameters... */
3890 if (dx < 0 || dy < 0) {
3891 if (fabs(met->lon[1] - met->lon[0]) < 0.5) {
3892 dx = 3;
3893 dy = 2;
3894 } else {
3895 dx = 6;
3896 dy = 4;
3897 }
3898 }
3899
3900 /* Calculate weights for smoothing... */
3901 float ws[dx + 1][dy + 1];
3902#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
3903 for (int ix = 0; ix <= dx; ix++)
3904 for (int iy = 0; iy < dy; iy++)
3905 ws[ix][iy] = (1.0f - (float) ix / (float) dx)
3906 * (1.0f - (float) iy / (float) dy);
3907
3908 /* Copy data... */
3909#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(3)
3910 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3911 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
3912 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
3913 help[ip][ix][iy] = met->z[ix][iy][ip];
3914
3915 /* Horizontal smoothing... */
3916#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(3)
3917 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
3918 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
3919 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
3920 float res = 0, wsum = 0;
3921 int iy0 = GSL_MAX(iy - dy + 1, 0);
3922 int iy1 = GSL_MIN(iy + dy - 1, met->ny - 1);
3923 for (int ix2 = ix - dx + 1; ix2 <= ix + dx - 1; ++ix2) {
3924 int ix3 = ix2;
3925 if (ix3 < 0)
3926 ix3 += met->nx;
3927 else if (ix3 >= met->nx)
3928 ix3 -= met->nx;
3929 for (int iy2 = iy0; iy2 <= iy1; ++iy2)
3930 if (isfinite(help[ip][ix3][iy2])) {
3931 float w = ws[abs(ix - ix2)][abs(iy - iy2)];
3932 res += w * help[ip][ix3][iy2];
3933 wsum += w;
3934 }
3935 }
3936 if (wsum > 0)
3937 met->z[ix][iy][ip] = res / wsum;
3938 else
3939 met->z[ix][iy][ip] = GSL_NAN;
3940 }
3941}

4058 met->p[0], met->p[1], met->p[met->np - 1]);

4155 WARN("Cannot read ozone data!");
4156 if (ctl->met_cloud == 1 || ctl->met_cloud == 3) {
4157 if (!read_met_nc_3d(ncid, "clwc", "CLWC", ctl, met, met->lwc, 1.0, 1))
4158 WARN("Cannot read cloud liquid water content!");
4159 if (!read_met_nc_3d(ncid, "ciwc", "CIWC", ctl, met, met->iwc, 1.0, 1))
4160 WARN("Cannot read cloud ice water content!");
4161 }
4162 if (ctl->met_cloud == 2 || ctl->met_cloud == 3) {
4163 if (!read_met_nc_3d
4164 (ncid, "crwc", "CRWC", ctl, met, met->lwc, 1.0,
4165 ctl->met_cloud == 2))
4166 WARN("Cannot read cloud rain water content!");
4167 if (!read_met_nc_3d
4168 (ncid, "cswc", "CSWC", ctl, met, met->iwc, 1.0,
4169 ctl->met_cloud == 2))
4170 WARN("Cannot read cloud snow water content!");
4171 }
4172 if (!read_met_nc_3d(ncid, "cc", "CC", ctl, met, met->cc, 1.0, 1))
4173 WARN("Cannot read cloud cover!");
4174
4175 } else
4176 ERRMSG("Meteo data format unknown!");
4177
4178 if (ctl->vert_coord_ap == 1) {
4179 /* Store the velocities on model levels for diabatic advection... */
4180 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4181 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
4182 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4183 met->ul[ix][iy][ip] = met->u[ix][iy][ip];
4184 met->vl[ix][iy][ip] = met->v[ix][iy][ip];
4185 }
4186 /* Original number of vertical levels... */
4187 met->npl = met->np;
4188 }
4189
4190 if (ctl->met_np > 0 || ctl->vert_coord_ap == 1) {
4191 /* Read pressure on model levels... */
4192 if (!read_met_nc_3d(ncid, "pl", "PL", ctl, met, met->pl, 0.01f, 1))
4193 if (!read_met_nc_3d(ncid, "pl", "PRESS", ctl, met, met->pl, 1.0, 1))
4194 ERRMSG("Cannot read pressure on model levels!");
4195 }
4196
4197 /* Transfer from model levels to pressure levels... */
4198 if (ctl->met_np > 0) {
4199
4200 /* Vertical interpolation from model to pressure levels... */
4201 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->t);
4202 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->u);
4203 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->v);
4204 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->w);
4205 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->h2o);
4206 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->o3);
4207 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->lwc);
4208 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->iwc);
4209 read_met_ml2pl(ctl, met, met->cc);
4210
4211 /* Set new pressure levels... */
4212 met->np = ctl->met_np;
4213 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
4214 met->p[ip] = ctl->met_p[ip];
4215 }
4216
4217 /* Check ordering of pressure levels... */
4218 for (int ip = 1; ip < met->np; ip++)
4219 if (met->p[ip - 1] < met->p[ip])
4220 ERRMSG("Pressure levels must be descending!");
4221
4222}

◆ read_met_ml2pl()

void read_met_ml2pl ( ctl_t *  ctl,
met_t *  met,
float  var[EX][EY][EP] 
)

Convert meteo data from model levels to pressure levels.

Definition at line 4226 of file libtrac.c.

4229 {
4230
4231 double aux[EP], p[EP];
4232
4233 /* Set timer... */
4234 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_ML2PL", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4235 LOG(2, "Interpolate meteo data to pressure levels...");
4236
4237 /* Loop over columns... */
4238#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) private(aux,p) collapse(2)
4239 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4240 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4241
4242 /* Copy pressure profile... */
4243 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
4244 p[ip] = met->pl[ix][iy][ip];
4245
4246 /* Interpolate... */
4247 for (int ip = 0; ip < ctl->met_np; ip++) {
4248 double pt = ctl->met_p[ip];
4249 if ((pt > p[0] && p[0] > p[1]) || (pt < p[0] && p[0] < p[1]))
4250 pt = p[0];
4251 else if ((pt > p[met->np - 1] && p[1] > p[0])
4252 || (pt < p[met->np - 1] && p[1] < p[0]))
4253 pt = p[met->np - 1];
4254 int ip2 = locate_irr(p, met->np, pt);
4255 aux[ip] = LIN(p[ip2], var[ix][iy][ip2],
4256 p[ip2 + 1], var[ix][iy][ip2 + 1], pt);
4257 }
4258
4259 /* Copy data... */
4260 for (int ip = 0; ip < ctl->met_np; ip++)
4261 var[ix][iy][ip] = (float) aux[ip];
4262 }
4263}

void read_met_monotonize ( met_t *  met)

Smooth vertical zeta and pressure profiles.

4268 {
4269
4270 /* Set timer... */
4271 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_MONOTONIZE", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4272 LOG(2, "Make zeta profiles monotone...");
4273
4274 /* Create monotone zeta profiles... */
4275#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
4276 for (int i = 0; i < met->nx; i++)
4277 for (int j = 0; j < met->ny; j++) {
4278 int k = 1;
4279
4280 while (k < met->npl) { /* Check if there is an inversion at level k... */
4281 if ((met->zetal[i][j][k - 1] >= met->zetal[i][j][k])) {
4282 /* Find the upper level k+l over the inversion... */
4283 int l = 0;
4284 do {
4285 l++;
4286 }
4287 while ((met->zetal[i][j][k - 1] >=
4288 met->zetal[i][j][k + l]) & (k + l < met->npl));
4289
4290 /* Interpolate linear between the top and bottom
4291 of the inversion... */
4292 float s =
4293 (float) (met->zetal[i][j][k + l] - met->zetal[i][j][k - 1])
4294 / (float) (met->hybrid[k + l] - met->hybrid[k - 1]);
4295
4296 for (int m = k; m < k + l; m++) {
4297 float d = (float) (met->hybrid[m] - met->hybrid[k - 1]);
4298 met->zetal[i][j][m] = s * d + met->zetal[i][j][k - 1];
4299 }
4300
4301 /* Search for more inversions above the last inversion ... */
4302 k = k + l;
4303 } else {
4304 k++;
4305 }
4306 }
4307 }
4308
4309 /* Create monotone pressure profiles... */
4310#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
4311 for (int i = 0; i < met->nx; i++)
4312 for (int j = 0; j < met->ny; j++) {
4313 int k = 1;
4314
4315 while (k < met->npl) { /* Check if there is an inversion at level k... */
4316 if ((met->pl[i][j][k - 1] <= met->pl[i][j][k])) {
4317 /* Find the upper level k+l over the inversion... */
4318 int l = 0;
4319 do {
4320 l++;
4321 }
4322 while ((met->pl[i][j][k - 1] <= met->pl[i][j][k + l]) & (k + l <
4323 met->npl));
4324
4325 /* Interpolate linear between the top and bottom
4326 of the inversion... */
4327 float s = (float) (met->pl[i][j][k + l] - met->pl[i][j][k - 1])
4328 / (float) (met->hybrid[k + l] - met->hybrid[k - 1]);
4329
4330 for (int m = k; m < k + l; m++) {
4331 float d = (float) (met->hybrid[m] - met->hybrid[k - 1]);
4332 met->pl[i][j][m] = s * d + met->pl[i][j][k - 1];
4333 }
4334
4335 /* Search for more inversions above the last inversion ... */
4336 k = k + l;
4337 } else {
4338 k++;

4354 {

4365 WARN("Cannot read 2-D variable: %s or %s", varname, varname2);
4366 return 0;

4376 &scalfac) == NC_NOERR) {
4377
4378 /* Allocate... */
4379 short *help;
4380 ALLOC(help, short,
4381 EX * EY * EP);
4382
4383 /* Read fill value and missing value... */
4384 short fillval, missval;
4385 if (nc_get_att_short(ncid, varid, "_FillValue", &fillval) != NC_NOERR)
4386 fillval = 0;
4387 if (nc_get_att_short(ncid, varid, "missing_value", &missval) != NC_NOERR)
4388 missval = 0;
4389
4390 /* Write info... */
4391 LOG(2, "Read 2-D variable: %s"
4392 " (FILL = %d, MISS = %d, SCALE = %g, OFFSET = %g)",
4393 varsel, fillval, missval, scalfac, offset);
4394
4395 /* Read data... */
4396 NC(nc_get_var_short(ncid, varid, help));
4397
4398 /* Check meteo data layout... */
4399 if (ctl->met_convention != 0)
4400 ERRMSG("Meteo data layout not implemented for packed netCDF files!");
4401
4402 /* Copy and check data... */
4403#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) num_threads(12)
4404 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4405 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4406 if (init)
4407 dest[ix][iy] = 0;
4408 short aux = help[ARRAY_2D(iy, ix, met->nx)];
4409 if ((fillval == 0 || aux != fillval)
4410 && (missval == 0 || aux != missval)
4411 && fabsf(aux * scalfac + offset) < 1e14f)
4412 dest[ix][iy] += scl * (aux * scalfac + offset);
4413 else
4414 dest[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
4415 }
4416
4417 /* Free... */
4418 free(help);
4419 }
4420
4421 /* Unpacked data... */
4422 else {

4425 float *help;

4427 EX * EY);

4434 missval = 0;

4437 LOG(2, "Read 2-D variable: %s (FILL = %g, MISS = %g)",
4438 varsel, fillval, missval);
4439
4440 /* Read data... */
4441 NC(nc_get_var_float(ncid, varid, help));
4442
4443 /* Check meteo data layout... */
4444 if (ctl->met_convention == 0) {
4445
4446 /* Copy and check data (ordering: lat, lon)... */
4447#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) num_threads(12)
4448 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4449 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4450 if (init)

4461 } else {
4462

◆ read_met_pbl()

void read_met_pbl ( met_t *  met)

Calculate pressure of the boundary layer.

Definition at line 4635 of file libtrac.c.

4636 {
4637
4638 /* Set timer... */
4639 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_PBL", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4640 LOG(2, "Calculate planetary boundary layer...");
4641
4642 /* Parameters used to estimate the height of the PBL
4643 (e.g., Vogelezang and Holtslag, 1996; Seidel et al., 2012)... */
4644 const double rib_crit = 0.25, dz = 0.05, umin = 5.0;
4645
4646 /* Loop over grid points... */
4647#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
4648 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4649 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4650
4651 /* Set bottom level of PBL... */
4652 double pbl_bot = met->ps[ix][iy] + DZ2DP(dz, met->ps[ix][iy]);
4653
4654 /* Find lowest level near the bottom... */
4655 int ip;
4656 for (ip = 1; ip < met->np; ip++)
4657 if (met->p[ip] < pbl_bot)
4658 break;
4659
4660 /* Get near surface data... */
4661 double zs = LIN(met->p[ip - 1], met->z[ix][iy][ip - 1],
4662 met->p[ip], met->z[ix][iy][ip], pbl_bot);
4663 double ts = LIN(met->p[ip - 1], met->t[ix][iy][ip - 1],
4664 met->p[ip], met->t[ix][iy][ip], pbl_bot);
4665 double us = LIN(met->p[ip - 1], met->u[ix][iy][ip - 1],
4666 met->p[ip], met->u[ix][iy][ip], pbl_bot);
4667 double vs = LIN(met->p[ip - 1], met->v[ix][iy][ip - 1],
4668 met->p[ip], met->v[ix][iy][ip], pbl_bot);
4669 double h2os = LIN(met->p[ip - 1], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip - 1],
4670 met->p[ip], met->h2o[ix][iy][ip], pbl_bot);
4671 double tvs = THETAVIRT(pbl_bot, ts, h2os);
4672
4673 /* Init... */
4674 double rib_old = 0;
4675
4676 /* Loop over levels... */
4677 for (; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4678
4679 /* Get squared horizontal wind speed... */
4680 double vh2
4681 = SQR(met->u[ix][iy][ip] - us) + SQR(met->v[ix][iy][ip] - vs);
4682 vh2 = GSL_MAX(vh2, SQR(umin));
4683
4684 /* Calculate bulk Richardson number... */
4685 double rib = G0 * 1e3 * (met->z[ix][iy][ip] - zs) / tvs
4686 * (THETAVIRT(met->p[ip], met->t[ix][iy][ip],
4687 met->h2o[ix][iy][ip]) - tvs) / vh2;
4688
4689 /* Check for critical value... */
4690 if (rib >= rib_crit) {
4691 met->pbl[ix][iy] = (float) (LIN(rib_old, met->p[ip - 1],
4692 rib, met->p[ip], rib_crit));
4693 if (met->pbl[ix][iy] > pbl_bot)
4694 met->pbl[ix][iy] = (float) pbl_bot;
4695 break;
4696 }
4697
4698 /* Save Richardson number... */
4699 rib_old = rib;
4700 }
4701 }
4702}

◆ read_met_periodic()

void read_met_periodic ( met_t *  met)

Create meteo data with periodic boundary conditions.

4707 {
4708
4709 /* Set timer... */
4710 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_PERIODIC", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4711 LOG(2, "Apply periodic boundary conditions...");
4712
4713 /* Check longitudes... */
4714 if (!(fabs(met->lon[met->nx - 1] - met->lon[0]
4715 + met->lon[1] - met->lon[0] - 360) < 0.01))
4716 return;
4717
4718 /* Increase longitude counter... */
4719 if ((++met->nx) > EX)
4720 ERRMSG("Cannot create periodic boundary conditions!");
4721
4722 /* Set longitude... */
4723 met->lon[met->nx - 1] = met->lon[met->nx - 2] + met->lon[1] - met->lon[0];
4724
4725 /* Loop over latitudes and pressure levels... */
4726#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4727 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4728 met->ps[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->ps[0][iy];
4729 met->zs[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->zs[0][iy];
4730 met->ts[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->ts[0][iy];
4731 met->us[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->us[0][iy];
4732 met->vs[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->vs[0][iy];
4733 met->lsm[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->lsm[0][iy];
4734 met->sst[met->nx - 1][iy] = met->sst[0][iy];
4735 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4736 met->t[met->nx - 1][iy][ip] = met->t[0][iy][ip];
4737 met->u[met->nx - 1][iy][ip] = met->u[0][iy][ip];
4738 met->v[met->nx - 1][iy][ip] = met->v[0][iy][ip];
4739 met->w[met->nx - 1][iy][ip] = met->w[0][iy][ip];
4740 met->h2o[met->nx - 1][iy][ip] = met->h2o[0][iy][ip];

◆ read_met_polar_winds()

void read_met_polar_winds ( met_t *  met)

Fix polar winds.

Definition at line 4758 of file libtrac.c.

4759 {
4760
4761 /* Set timer... */
4762 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_POLAR_WINDS", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4763 LOG(2, "Apply fix for polar winds...");
4764
4765 /* Loop over hemispheres... */
4766 for (int ihem = 0; ihem < 2; ihem++) {
4767
4768 /* Set latitude indices... */
4769 int i89 = 1, i90 = 0, sign = 1;
4770 if (ihem == 1) {
4771 i89 = met->ny - 2;
4772 i90 = met->ny - 1;
4773 }
4774 if (met->lat[i90] < 0)
4775 sign = -1;
4776
4777 /* Look-up table of cosinus and sinus... */
4778 double clon[EX], slon[EX];
4779#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4780 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++) {
4781 clon[ix] = cos(sign * met->lon[ix] / 180. * M_PI);
4782 slon[ix] = sin(sign * met->lon[ix] / 180. * M_PI);
4783 }
4784
4785 /* Loop over levels... */
4786#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4787 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4788
4789 /* Transform 89 degree u and v winds into Cartesian coordinates and take the mean... */
4790 double vel89x = 0, vel89y = 0;
4791 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++) {
4792 vel89x +=
4793 (met->u[ix][i89][ip] * clon[ix] -
4794 met->v[ix][i89][ip] * slon[ix]) / met->nx;
4795 vel89y +=
4796 (met->u[ix][i89][ip] * slon[ix] +
4797 met->v[ix][i89][ip] * clon[ix]) / met->nx;
4798 }
4799
4800 /* Replace 90 degree winds by 89 degree mean... */
4801 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++) {
4802 met->u[ix][i90][ip]
4803 = (float) (vel89x * clon[ix] + vel89y * slon[ix]);
4804 met->v[ix][i90][ip]
4805 = (float) (-vel89x * slon[ix] + vel89y * clon[ix]);
4806 }
4807 }
4808 }
4809}

void read_met_pv ( met_t *  met)

Calculate potential vorticity.
