4814 {
4815
4816 double pows[EP];
4817
4818 /* Set timer... */
4819 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_PV", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4820 LOG(2, "Calculate potential vorticity...");
4821
4822 /* Set powers... */
4823#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4824 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++)
4825 pows[ip] = pow(1000. / met->p[ip], 0.286);
4826
4827 /* Loop over grid points... */
4828#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4829 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++) {
4830
4831 /* Set indices... */
4832 int ix0 = GSL_MAX(ix - 1, 0);
4833 int ix1 = GSL_MIN(ix + 1, met->nx - 1);
4834
4835 /* Loop over grid points... */
4836 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4837
4838 /* Set indices... */
4839 int iy0 = GSL_MAX(iy - 1, 0);
4840 int iy1 = GSL_MIN(iy + 1, met->ny - 1);
4841
4842 /* Set auxiliary variables... */
4843 double latr = 0.5 * (met->lat[iy1] + met->lat[iy0]);
4844 double dx = 1000. * DEG2DX(met->lon[ix1] - met->lon[ix0], latr);
4845 double dy = 1000. * DEG2DY(met->lat[iy1] - met->lat[iy0]);
4846 double c0 = cos(met->lat[iy0] / 180. * M_PI);
4847 double c1 = cos(met->lat[iy1] / 180. * M_PI);
4848 double cr = cos(latr / 180. * M_PI);
4849 double vort = 2 * 7.2921e-5 * sin(latr * M_PI / 180.);
4850
4851 /* Loop over grid points... */
4852 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4853
4854 /* Get gradients in longitude... */
4855 double dtdx
4856 = (met->t[ix1][iy][ip] - met->t[ix0][iy][ip]) * pows[ip] / dx;
4857 double dvdx = (met->v[ix1][iy][ip] - met->v[ix0][iy][ip]) / dx;
4858
4859 /* Get gradients in latitude... */
4860 double dtdy
4861 = (met->t[ix][iy1][ip] - met->t[ix][iy0][ip]) * pows[ip] / dy;
4862 double dudy
4863 = (met->u[ix][iy1][ip] * c1 - met->u[ix][iy0][ip] * c0) / dy;
4864
4865 /* Set indices... */
4866 int ip0 = GSL_MAX(ip - 1, 0);
4867 int ip1 = GSL_MIN(ip + 1, met->np - 1);
4868
4869 /* Get gradients in pressure... */
4870 double dtdp, dudp, dvdp;
4871 double dp0 = 100. * (met->p[ip] - met->p[ip0]);
4872 double dp1 = 100. * (met->p[ip1] - met->p[ip]);
4873 if (ip != ip0 && ip != ip1) {
4874 double denom = dp0 * dp1 * (dp0 + dp1);
4875 dtdp = (dp0 * dp0 * met->t[ix][iy][ip1] * pows[ip1]
4876 - dp1 * dp1 * met->t[ix][iy][ip0] * pows[ip0]
4877 + (dp1 * dp1 - dp0 * dp0) * met->t[ix][iy][ip] * pows[ip])
4878 / denom;
4879 dudp = (dp0 * dp0 * met->u[ix][iy][ip1]
4880 - dp1 * dp1 * met->u[ix][iy][ip0]
4881 + (dp1 * dp1 - dp0 * dp0) * met->u[ix][iy][ip])
4882 / denom;
4883 dvdp = (dp0 * dp0 * met->v[ix][iy][ip1]
4884 - dp1 * dp1 * met->v[ix][iy][ip0]
4885 + (dp1 * dp1 - dp0 * dp0) * met->v[ix][iy][ip])
4886 / denom;
4887 } else {
4888 double denom = dp0 + dp1;
4889 dtdp =
4890 (met->t[ix][iy][ip1] * pows[ip1] -
4891 met->t[ix][iy][ip0] * pows[ip0]) / denom;
4892 dudp = (met->u[ix][iy][ip1] - met->u[ix][iy][ip0]) / denom;
4893 dvdp = (met->v[ix][iy][ip1] - met->v[ix][iy][ip0]) / denom;
4894 }
4895
4896 /* Calculate PV... */
4897 met->pv[ix][iy][ip] = (float)
4898 (1e6 * G0 *
4899 (-dtdp * (dvdx - dudy / cr + vort) + dvdp * dtdx - dudp * dtdy));
4900 }
4901 }
4902 }
4903
4904 /* Fix for polar regions... */
4905#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
4906 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4907 for (int ip = 0; ip < met->np; ip++) {
4908 met->pv[ix][0][ip]
4909 = met->pv[ix][1][ip]
4910 = met->pv[ix][2][ip];
4911 met->pv[ix][met->ny - 1][ip]
4912 = met->pv[ix][met->ny - 2][ip]
4913 = met->pv[ix][met->ny - 3][ip];
4914 }
4915}

◆ read_met_ozone()

void read_met_ozone ( met_t *  met)

Calculate total column ozone.

Definition at line 4919 of file libtrac.c.

4920 {
4921
4922 /* Set timer... */
4923 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_OZONE", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
4924 LOG(2, "Calculate total column ozone...");
4925
4926 /* Loop over columns... */
4927#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
4928 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
4929 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
4930
4931 /* Integrate... */
4932 double cd = 0;
4933 for (int ip = 1; ip < met->np; ip++)
4934 if (met->p[ip - 1] <= met->ps[ix][iy]) {
4935 double vmr = 0.5 * (met->o3[ix][iy][ip - 1] + met->o3[ix][iy][ip]);
4936 double dp = met->p[ip - 1] - met->p[ip];
4937 cd += vmr * MO3 / MA * dp * 1e2 / G0;
4938 }
4939
4940 /* Convert to Dobson units... */
4941 met->o3c[ix][iy] = (float) (cd / 2.1415e-5);
4942 }
4943}

void read_met_surface ( int  ncid,
met_t *  met,

5090 {
5091
5092 /* Set timer... */
5093 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_SURFACE", "INPUT", NVTX_READ);
5094 LOG(2, "Read surface data...");
5095
5096 /* MPTRAC meteo data... */
5097 if (ctl->clams_met_data == 0) {
5098
5099 /* Read surface pressure... */
5100 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "lnsp", "LNSP", ctl, met, met->ps, 1.0f, 1)) {
5101 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "ps", "PS", ctl, met, met->ps, 0.01f, 1)) {
5102 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "sp", "SP", ctl, met, met->ps, 0.01f, 1)) {
5103 WARN("Cannot not read surface pressure data (use lowest level)!");
5104 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5105 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5106 met->ps[ix][iy] = (float) met->p[0];
5107 }
5108 }
5109 } else
5110 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5111 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5112 met->ps[ix][iy] = (float) (exp(met->ps[ix][iy]) / 100.);
5113
5114 /* Read geopotential height at the surface... */
5115 if (!read_met_nc_2d
5116 (ncid, "z", "Z", ctl, met, met->zs, (float) (1. / (1000. * G0)), 1))
5117 if (!read_met_nc_2d
5118 (ncid, "zm", "ZM", ctl, met, met->zs, (float) (1. / 1000.), 1))
5119 WARN("Cannot read surface geopotential height!");
5120
5121 /* Read temperature at the surface... */
5122 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "t2m", "T2M", ctl, met, met->ts, 1.0, 1))
5123 WARN("Cannot read surface temperature!");
5124
5125 /* Read zonal wind at the surface... */
5126 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "u10m", "U10M", ctl, met, met->us, 1.0, 1))
5127 WARN("Cannot read surface zonal wind!");
5128
5129 /* Read meridional wind at the surface... */
5130 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "v10m", "V10M", ctl, met, met->vs, 1.0, 1))
5131 WARN("Cannot read surface meridional wind!");
5132
5133 /* Read land-sea mask... */
5134 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "lsm", "LSM", ctl, met, met->lsm, 1.0, 1))
5135 WARN("Cannot read land-sea mask!");
5136
5137 /* Read sea surface temperature... */
5138 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "sstk", "SSTK", ctl, met, met->sst, 1.0, 1))
5139 WARN("Cannot read sea surface temperature!");
5140 }
5141
5142 /* CLaMS meteo data... */
5143 else {
5144
5145 /* Read surface pressure... */
5146 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "ps", "PS", ctl, met, met->ps, 0.01f, 1)) {
5147 WARN("Cannot not read surface pressure data (use lowest level)!");
5148 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5149 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5150 met->ps[ix][iy] = (float) met->p[0];
5151 }
5152
5153 /* Read geopotential height at the surface
5154 (use lowermost level of 3-D data field)... */
5155 float *help;
5156 ALLOC(help, float,
5157 EX * EY * EP);
5158 memcpy(help, met->pl, sizeof(met->pl));
5159 if (!read_met_nc_3d
5160 (ncid, "gph", "GPH", ctl, met, met->pl, (float) (1e-3 / G0), 1)) {
5161 ERRMSG("Cannot read geopotential height!");
5162 } else
5163 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5164 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5165 met->zs[ix][iy] = met->pl[ix][iy][0];
5166 memcpy(met->pl, help, sizeof(met->pl));
5167 free(help);
5168
5169 /* Read temperature at the surface... */
5170 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "t2", "T2", ctl, met, met->ts, 1.0, 1))
5171 WARN("Cannot read surface temperature!");
5172
5173 /* Read zonal wind at the surface... */
5174 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "u10", "U10", ctl, met, met->us, 1.0, 1))
5175 WARN("Cannot read surface zonal wind!");
5176
5177 /* Read meridional wind at the surface... */
5178 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "v10", "V10", ctl, met, met->vs, 1.0, 1))
5179 WARN("Cannot read surface meridional wind!");
5180
5181 /* Read land-sea mask... */
5182 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "lsm", "LSM", ctl, met, met->lsm, 1.0, 1))
5183 WARN("Cannot read land-sea mask!");
5184
5185 /* Read sea surface temperature... */
5186 if (!read_met_nc_2d(ncid, "sstk", "SSTK", ctl, met, met->sst, 1.0, 1))
5187 WARN("Cannot read sea surface temperature!");
5188 }
5189}

5201 /* Set timer... */
5202 SELECT_TIMER("READ_MET_TROPO", "METPROC", NVTX_READ);
5203 LOG(2, "Calculate tropopause...");
5204
5205 /* Get altitude and pressure profiles... */
5206#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
5207 for (int iz = 0; iz < met->np; iz++)
5208 z[iz] = Z(met->p[iz]);
5209#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
5210 for (int iz = 0; iz <= 190; iz++) {
5211 z2[iz] = 4.5 + 0.1 * iz;
5212 p2[iz] = P(z2[iz]);
5213 }
5214
5215 /* Do not calculate tropopause... */
5216 if (ctl->met_tropo == 0)
5217#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
5218 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5219 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5220 met->pt[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
5221
5222 /* Use tropopause climatology... */
5223 else if (ctl->met_tropo == 1) {
5224#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
5225 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5226 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++)
5227 met->pt[ix][iy] = (float) clim_tropo(clim, met->time, met->lat[iy]);
5228 }
5229
5230 /* Use cold point... */
5231 else if (ctl->met_tropo == 2) {
5232
5233 /* Loop over grid points... */
5234#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) private(t,t2) collapse(2)
5235 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5236 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
5237
5238 /* Interpolate temperature profile... */
5239 for (int iz = 0; iz < met->np; iz++)
5240 t[iz] = met->t[ix][iy][iz];
5241 spline(z, t, met->np, z2, t2, 171, ctl->met_tropo_spline);
5242
5243 /* Find minimum... */
5244 int iz = (int) gsl_stats_min_index(t2, 1, 171);
5245 if (iz > 0 && iz < 170)
5246 met->pt[ix][iy] = (float) p2[iz];
5247 else
5248 met->pt[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
5249 }
5250 }
5251
5252 /* Use WMO definition... */
5253 else if (ctl->met_tropo == 3 || ctl->met_tropo == 4) {
5254
5255 /* Loop over grid points... */
5256#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) private(t,t2) collapse(2)
5257 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5258 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
5259
5260 /* Interpolate temperature profile... */
5261 int iz;
5262 for (iz = 0; iz < met->np; iz++)
5263 t[iz] = met->t[ix][iy][iz];
5264 spline(z, t, met->np, z2, t2, 191, ctl->met_tropo_spline);
5265
5266 /* Find 1st tropopause... */
5267 met->pt[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
5268 for (iz = 0; iz <= 170; iz++) {
5269 int found = 1;
5270 for (int iz2 = iz + 1; iz2 <= iz + 20; iz2++)
5271 if (LAPSE(p2[iz], t2[iz], p2[iz2], t2[iz2]) > 2.0) {
5272 found = 0;
5273 break;
5274 }
5275 if (found) {
5276 if (iz > 0 && iz < 170)
5277 met->pt[ix][iy] = (float) p2[iz];
5278 break;
5279 }
5280 }
5281
5282 /* Find 2nd tropopause... */
5283 if (ctl->met_tropo == 4) {
5284 met->pt[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
5285 for (; iz <= 170; iz++) {
5286 int found = 1;
5287 for (int iz2 = iz + 1; iz2 <= iz + 10; iz2++)
5288 if (LAPSE(p2[iz], t2[iz], p2[iz2], t2[iz2]) < 3.0) {
5289 found = 0;
5290 break;
5291 }
5292 if (found)
5293 break;
5294 }
5295 for (; iz <= 170; iz++) {
5296 int found = 1;
5297 for (int iz2 = iz + 1; iz2 <= iz + 20; iz2++)
5298 if (LAPSE(p2[iz], t2[iz], p2[iz2], t2[iz2]) > 2.0) {
5299 found = 0;
5300 break;
5301 }
5302 if (found) {
5303 if (iz > 0 && iz < 170)
5304 met->pt[ix][iy] = (float) p2[iz];
5305 break;
5306 }
5307 }
5308 }
5309 }
5310 }
5311
5312 /* Use dynamical tropopause... */
5313 else if (ctl->met_tropo == 5) {
5314
5315 /* Loop over grid points... */
5316#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) private(pv,pv2,th,th2) collapse(2)
5317 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5318 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
5319
5320 /* Interpolate potential vorticity profile... */
5321 for (int iz = 0; iz < met->np; iz++)
5322 pv[iz] = met->pv[ix][iy][iz];
5323 spline(z, pv, met->np, z2, pv2, 171, ctl->met_tropo_spline);
5324
5325 /* Interpolate potential temperature profile... */
5326 for (int iz = 0; iz < met->np; iz++)
5327 th[iz] = THETA(met->p[iz], met->t[ix][iy][iz]);
5328 spline(z, th, met->np, z2, th2, 171, ctl->met_tropo_spline);
5329
5330 /* Find dynamical tropopause... */
5331 met->pt[ix][iy] = GSL_NAN;
5332 for (int iz = 0; iz <= 170; iz++)
5333 if (fabs(pv2[iz]) >= ctl->met_tropo_pv
5334 || th2[iz] >= ctl->met_tropo_theta) {
5335 if (iz > 0 && iz < 170)
5336 met->pt[ix][iy] = (float) p2[iz];
5337 break;
5338 }
5339 }
5340 }
5341
5342 else
5343 ERRMSG("Cannot calculate tropopause!");
5344
5345 /* Interpolate temperature, geopotential height, and water vapor... */
5346#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) collapse(2)
5347 for (int ix = 0; ix < met->nx; ix++)
5348 for (int iy = 0; iy < met->ny; iy++) {
5349 double h2ot, tt, zt;
5350 INTPOL_INIT;
5351 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->t, met->pt[ix][iy], met->lon[ix],
5352 met->lat[iy], &tt, ci, cw, 1);
5353 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->z, met->pt[ix][iy], met->lon[ix],
5354 met->lat[iy], &zt, ci, cw, 0);
5355 intpol_met_space_3d(met, met->h2o, met->pt[ix][iy], met->lon[ix],
5356 met->lat[iy], &h2ot, ci, cw, 0);
5357 met->tt[ix][iy] = (float) tt;
5358 met->zt[ix][iy] = (float) zt;
5359 met->h2ot[ix][iy] = (float) h2ot;
5360 }
5361}

5524 ERRMSG("Missing variable %s!\n", fullname1);

5527 /* Write info... */

5530 /* Return values... */
5531 if (value != NULL)
5532 sprintf(value, "%s", rval);
5533 return atof(rval);

5542 {
5543
5544 /* Convert particle radius from microns to m... */
5545 double rp_help = rp * 1e-6;
5546
5547 /* Density of dry air [kg / m^3]... */
5548 double rho = RHO(p, T);
5549
5550 /* Dynamic viscosity of air [kg / (m s)]... */
5551 double eta = 1.8325e-5 * (416.16 / (T + 120.)) * pow(T / 296.16, 1.5);
5552
5553 /* Thermal velocity of an air molecule [m / s]... */
5554 double v = sqrt(8. * KB * T / (M_PI * 4.8096e-26));
5555
5556 /* Mean free path of an air molecule [m]... */
5557 double lambda = 2. * eta / (rho * v);
5558
5559 /* Knudsen number for air (dimensionless)... */
5560 double K = lambda / rp_help;
5561
5562 /* Cunningham slip-flow correction (dimensionless)... */
5563 double G = 1. + K * (1.249 + 0.42 * exp(-0.87 / K));
5564
5565 /* Sedimentation velocity [m / s]... */
5566 return 2. * SQR(rp_help) * (rhop - rho) * G0 / (9. * eta) * G;
5567}

◆ stddev()

float stddev ( const float *  data,
const int  n 
)

Calculate standard deviation.

Definition at line 5620 of file libtrac.c.

5622 {
5623
5624 if (n <= 0)
5625 return 0;
5626
5627 float mean = 0, var = 0;
5628
5629 for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
5630 mean += data[i];
5631 var += SQR(data[i]);
5632 }
5633
5634 var = var / (float) n - SQR(mean / (float) n);
5635
5636 return (var > 0 ? sqrtf(var) : 0);
5637}

◆ sza_calc()

double sza_calc ( const double  sec,
const double  lon,
const double  lat 
)

Calculate solar zenith angle.

Definition at line 5641 of file libtrac.c.

5644 {
5645
5646 /* Number of days and fraction with respect to 2000-01-01T12:00Z... */
5647 const double D = sec / 86400 - 0.5;
5648
5649 /* Geocentric apparent ecliptic longitude [rad]... */
5650 const double g = (357.529 + 0.98560028 * D) * M_PI / 180;
5651 const double q = 280.459 + 0.98564736 * D;
5652 const double L = (q + 1.915 * sin(g) + 0.020 * sin(2 * g)) * M_PI / 180;
5653
5654 /* Mean obliquity of the ecliptic [rad]... */
5655 const double e = (23.439 - 0.00000036 * D) * M_PI / 180;
5656
5657 /* Declination [rad]... */
5658 const double sindec = sin(e) * sin(L);
5659
5660 /* Right ascension [rad]... */
5661 const double ra = atan2(cos(e) * sin(L), cos(L));
5662
5663 /* Greenwich Mean Sidereal Time [h]... */
5664 const double GMST = 18.697374558 + 24.06570982441908 * D;
5665
5666 /* Local Sidereal Time [h]... */
5667 const double LST = GMST + lon / 15;
5668
5669 /* Hour angle [rad]... */
5670 const double h = LST / 12 * M_PI - ra;
5671
5672 /* Convert latitude... */
5673 const double lat_help = lat * M_PI / 180;
5674
5675 /* Return solar zenith angle [rad]... */
5676 return acos(sin(lat_help) * sindec +
5677 cos(lat_help) * sqrt(1 - SQR(sindec)) * cos(h));
5678}

void timer ( const char *  name,

5716 {

5721 rt_min[NTIMER], rt_max[NTIMER], dt, t0, t1;
5722
5723 static int iname = -1, igroup = -1, nname, ngroup, ct_name[NTIMER];
5724
5725 /* Get time... */
5726 t1 = omp_get_wtime();
5727 dt = t1 - t0;
5728
5729 /* Add elapsed time to current timers... */
5730 if (iname >= 0) {
5731 rt_name[iname] += dt;
5732 rt_min[iname] = (ct_name[iname] <= 0 ? dt : GSL_MIN(rt_min[iname], dt));
5733 rt_max[iname] = (ct_name[iname] <= 0 ? dt : GSL_MAX(rt_max[iname], dt));
5734 ct_name[iname]++;
5735 }
5736 if (igroup >= 0)
5737 rt_group[igroup] += t1 - t0;
5738
5739 /* Report timers... */
5740 if (output) {
5741 for (int i = 0; i < nname; i++)
5742 LOG(1, "TIMER_%s = %.3f s (min= %g s, mean= %g s,"
5743 " max= %g s, n= %d)", names[i], rt_name[i], rt_min[i],
5744 rt_name[i] / ct_name[i], rt_max[i], ct_name[i]);
5745 for (int i = 0; i < ngroup; i++)
5746 LOG(1, "TIMER_GROUP_%s = %.3f s", groups[i], rt_group[i]);
5747 double total = 0.0;
5748 for (int i = 0; i < nname; i++)
5749 total += rt_name[i];
5750 LOG(1, "TIMER_TOTAL = %.3f s", total);
5751 }
5752
5753 /* Identify IDs of next timer... */
5754 for (iname = 0; iname < nname; iname++)
5755 if (strcasecmp(name, names[iname]) == 0)
5756 break;
5757 for (igroup = 0; igroup < ngroup; igroup++)
5758 if (strcasecmp(group, groups[igroup]) == 0)
5759 break;
5760
5761 /* Check whether this is a new timer... */
5762 if (iname >= nname) {
5763 sprintf(names[iname], "%s", name);
5764 if ((++nname) > NTIMER)
5765 ERRMSG("Too many timers!");
5766 }
5767
5768 /* Check whether this is a new group... */
5769 if (igroup >= ngroup) {
5770 sprintf(groups[igroup], "%s", group);
5771 if ((++ngroup) > NTIMER)
5772 ERRMSG("Too many groups!");
5773 }
5774
5775 /* Save starting time... */
5776 t0 = t1;
5777}

◆ time_from_filename()

double time_from_filename ( const char *  filename,
int  offset 
)

Extract time information from filename.

Definition at line 5781 of file libtrac.c.

5783 {
5784
5785 char tstr[10];
5786
5787 double t;
5788
5789 /* Get time from filename... */
5790 int len = (int) strlen(filename);
5791 sprintf(tstr, "%.4s", &filename[len - offset]);
5792 int year = atoi(tstr);
5793 sprintf(tstr, "%.2s", &filename[len - offset + 5]);
5794 int mon = atoi(tstr);
5795 sprintf(tstr, "%.2s", &filename[len - offset + 8]);
5796 int day = atoi(tstr);
5797 sprintf(tstr, "%.2s", &filename[len - offset + 11]);
5798 int hour = atoi(tstr);
5799 sprintf(tstr, "%.2s", &filename[len - offset + 14]);
5800 int min = atoi(tstr);
5801
5802 /* Check time... */
5803 if (year < 1900 || year > 2100 || mon < 1 || mon > 12 || day < 1
5804 || day > 31 || hour < 0 || hour > 23 || min < 0 || min > 59)
5805 ERRMSG("Cannot read time from filename!");
5806
5807 /* Convert time to Julian seconds... */
5808 time2jsec(year, mon, day, hour, min, 0, 0.0, &t);
5809
5810 /* Return time... */
5811 return t;
5812}

◆ tropo_weight()

double tropo_weight ( const clim_t *  clim,
const double  t,
const double  lat,
const double  p 
)

Get weighting factor based on tropopause distance.

Definition at line 5816 of file libtrac.c.

5820 {
5821
5822 /* Get tropopause pressure... */
5823 double pt = clim_tropo(clim, t, lat);
5824
5825 /* Get pressure range... */
5826 double p1 = pt * 0.866877899;
5827 double p0 = pt / 0.866877899;
5828
5829 /* Get weighting factor... */
5830 if (p > p0)
5831 return 1;
5832 else if (p < p1)
5833 return 0;
5834 else
5835 return LIN(p0, 1.0, p1, 0.0, p);
5836}

5844 {

5850 LOG(1, "Write atmospheric data: %s", filename);
5851
5852 /* Write ASCII data... */
5853 if (ctl->atm_type_out == 0)
5854 write_atm_asc(filename, ctl, atm, t);
5855
5856 /* Write binary data... */
5857 else if (ctl->atm_type_out == 1)
5858 write_atm_bin(filename, ctl, atm);
5859
5860 /* Write netCDF data... */

5862 write_atm_nc(filename, ctl, atm);

5866 write_atm_clams_traj(filename, ctl, atm, t);
5867

5870 write_atm_clams(filename, ctl, atm);
5871
5872 /* Error... */
5873 else
5874 ERRMSG("Atmospheric data type not supported!");
5875
5876 /* Write info... */
5877 double mini, maxi;
5878 LOG(2, "Number of particles: %d", atm->np);
5879 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->time, 1, (size_t) atm->np);
5880 LOG(2, "Time range: %.2f ... %.2f s", mini, maxi);
5881 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->p, 1, (size_t) atm->np);
5882 LOG(2, "Altitude range: %g ... %g km", Z(maxi), Z(mini));
5883 LOG(2, "Pressure range: %g ... %g hPa", maxi, mini);
5884 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->lon, 1, (size_t) atm->np);
5885 LOG(2, "Longitude range: %g ... %g deg", mini, maxi);
5886 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->lat, 1, (size_t) atm->np);
5887 LOG(2, "Latitude range: %g ... %g deg", mini, maxi);
5888 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
5889 char msg[LEN];
5890 sprintf(msg, "Quantity %s range: %s ... %s %s",
5891 ctl->qnt_name[iq], ctl->qnt_format[iq],
5892 ctl->qnt_format[iq], ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
5893 gsl_stats_minmax(&mini, &maxi, atm->q[iq], 1, (size_t) atm->np);
5894 LOG(2, msg, mini, maxi);
5895 }

5904 {
5905
5906 FILE *out;

5908 /* Set time interval for output... */
5909 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
5910 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
5911
5912 /* Check if gnuplot output is requested... */
5913 if (ctl->atm_gpfile[0] != '-') {
5914
5915 /* Create gnuplot pipe... */
5916 if (!(out = popen("gnuplot", "w")))
5917 ERRMSG("Cannot create pipe to gnuplot!");
5918
5919 /* Set plot filename... */
5920 fprintf(out, "set out \"%s.png\"\n", filename);
5921
5922 /* Set time string... */
5923 double r;
5924 int year, mon, day, hour, min, sec;
5925 jsec2time(t, &year, &mon, &day, &hour, &min, &sec, &r);
5926 fprintf(out, "timestr=\"%d-%02d-%02d, %02d:%02d UTC\"\n",
5927 year, mon, day, hour, min);
5928
5929 /* Dump gnuplot file to pipe... */
5930 FILE *in;
5931 if (!(in = fopen(ctl->atm_gpfile, "r")))
5932 ERRMSG("Cannot open file!");
5933 char line[LEN];
5934 while (fgets(line, LEN, in))
5935 fprintf(out, "%s", line);
5936 fclose(in);
5937 }
5938
5939 else {
5940
5941 /* Create file... */
5942 if (!(out = fopen(filename, "w")))
5943 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");
5944 }
5945
5946 /* Write header... */
5947 fprintf(out,
5948 "# $1 = time [s]\n"
5949 "# $2 = altitude [km]\n"
5950 "# $3 = longitude [deg]\n" "# $4 = latitude [deg]\n");
5951 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++)
5952 fprintf(out, "# $%i = %s [%s]\n", iq + 5, ctl->qnt_name[iq],
5953 ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
5954 fprintf(out, "\n");
5955
5956 /* Write data... */
5957 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip += ctl->atm_stride) {
5958
5959 /* Check time... */
5960 if (ctl->atm_filter == 2 && (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1))
5961 continue;
5962
5963 /* Write output... */
5964 fprintf(out, "%.2f %g %g %g", atm->time[ip], Z(atm->p[ip]),
5965 atm->lon[ip], atm->lat[ip]);
5966 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
5967 fprintf(out, " ");
5968 if (ctl->atm_filter == 1 && (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1))
5969 fprintf(out, ctl->qnt_format[iq], GSL_NAN);
5970 else
5971 fprintf(out, ctl->qnt_format[iq], atm->q[iq][ip]);
5972 }
5973 fprintf(out, "\n");
5974 }
5975
5976 /* Close file... */
5977 fclose(out);
5978}

6039 static size_t out_cnt = 0;

6044 int year_stop, mon_stop, day_stop, hour_stop, min_stop, sec_stop;
6045 char filename_out[2 * LEN] = "traj_fix_3d_YYYYMMDDHH_YYYYMMDDHH.nc";
6046
6047 int ncid, varid, tid, pid, cid;
6048 int dim_ids[2];

6050 /* time, nparc */
6051 size_t start[2];
6052 size_t count[2];
6053
6054 /* Determine start and stop times of calculation... */
6055 jsec2time(t, &year, &mon, &day, &hour, &min, &sec, &r);
6056 jsec2time(ctl->t_start, &year_start, &mon_start, &day_start, &hour_start,

6061 sprintf(filename_out, "%s/traj_fix_3d_%02d%02d%02d%02d_%02d%02d%02d%02d.nc",
6062 dirname,
6063 year_start % 100, mon_start, day_start, hour_start,
6064 year_stop % 100, mon_stop, day_stop, hour_stop);
6065 LOG(1, "Write traj file: %s", filename_out);
6066
6067 /* Define hyperslap for the traj_file... */
6068 start[0] = out_cnt;
6069 start[1] = 0;
6070 count[0] = 1;
6071 count[1] = (size_t) atm->np;
6072
6073 /* Create the file at the first timestep... */
6074 if (out_cnt == 0) {
6075
6076 /* Create file... */
6077 nc_create(filename_out, NC_CLOBBER, &ncid);
6078
6079 /* Define dimensions... */
6080 NC(nc_def_dim(ncid, "time", NC_UNLIMITED, &tid));
6081 NC(nc_def_dim(ncid, "NPARTS", (size_t) atm->np, &pid));
6082 NC(nc_def_dim(ncid, "TMDT", 7, &cid));
6083 dim_ids[0] = tid;
6084 dim_ids[1] = pid;
6085
6086 /* Define variables and their attributes... */
6087 NC_DEF_VAR("time", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &tid, "Time",
6088 "seconds since 2000-01-01 00:00:00 UTC");
6089 NC_DEF_VAR("LAT", NC_DOUBLE, 2, dim_ids, "Latitude", "deg");
6090 NC_DEF_VAR("LON", NC_DOUBLE, 2, dim_ids, "Longitude", "deg");
6091 NC_DEF_VAR("PRESS", NC_DOUBLE, 2, dim_ids, "Pressure", "hPa");
6092 NC_DEF_VAR("ZETA", NC_DOUBLE, 2, dim_ids, "Zeta", "K");
6093 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++)
6094 NC_DEF_VAR(ctl->qnt_name[iq], NC_DOUBLE, 2, dim_ids,
6095 ctl->qnt_name[iq], ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
6096
6097 /* Define global attributes... */
6098 NC_PUT_ATT_GLOBAL("exp_VERTCOOR_name", "zeta");
6099 NC_PUT_ATT_GLOBAL("model", "MPTRAC");
6100
6101 /* End definitions... */
6102 NC(nc_enddef(ncid));
6103 NC(nc_close(ncid));
6104 }
6105
6106 /* Increment global counter to change hyperslap... */
6107 out_cnt++;
6108
6109 /* Open file... */
6110 NC(nc_open(filename_out, NC_WRITE, &ncid));
6111
6112 /* Write data... */
6113 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("time", atm->time, 1);
6114 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("LAT", atm->lat, 1);
6115 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("LON", atm->lon, 1);
6116 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("PRESS", atm->p, 1);
6117 if (ctl->vert_coord_ap == 1) {
6118 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("ZETA", atm->q[ctl->qnt_zeta], 1);
6119 } else if (ctl->qnt_zeta >= 0) {
6120 NC_PUT_DOUBLE("ZETA", atm->q[ctl->qnt_zeta_d], 1);
6121 }
6122 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++)
6123 NC_PUT_DOUBLE(ctl->qnt_name[iq], atm->q[iq], 1);
6124
6125 /* Close file... */
6126 NC(nc_close(ncid));
6127
6128 /* At the last time step create the init_fix_YYYYMMDDHH file... */
6129 if ((year == year_stop) && (mon == mon_stop)
6130 && (day == day_stop) && (hour == hour_stop)) {
6131
6132 /* Set filename... */
6133 char filename_init[2 * LEN] = "./init_fix_YYYYMMDDHH.nc";

6135 dirname, year_stop % 100, mon_stop, day_stop, hour_stop);
6136 LOG(1, "Write init file: %s", filename_init);
6137
6138 /* Create file... */
6139 nc_create(filename_init, NC_CLOBBER, &ncid);
6140
6141 /* Define dimensions... */
6142 NC(nc_def_dim(ncid, "time", 1, &tid));
6143 NC(nc_def_dim(ncid, "NPARTS", (size_t) atm->np, &pid));
6144 dim_ids[0] = tid;
6145 dim_ids[1] = pid;
6146
6147 /* Define variables and their attributes... */
6148 NC_DEF_VAR("time", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &tid, "Time",
6149 "seconds since 2000-01-01 00:00:00 UTC");
6150 NC_DEF_VAR("LAT", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &pid, "Latitude", "deg");
6151 NC_DEF_VAR("LON", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &pid, "Longitude", "deg");
6152 NC_DEF_VAR("PRESS", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &pid, "Pressure", "hPa");
6153 NC_DEF_VAR("ZETA", NC_DOUBLE, 1, &pid, "Zeta", "K");

6307 ALLOC(rlon, double,
6308 NOBS);
6309 ALLOC(rlat, double,
6310 NOBS);
6311 ALLOC(robs, double,
6312 NOBS);
6313
6314 /* Read observation data... */
6315 read_obs(ctl->csi_obsfile, ctl, rt, rz, rlon, rlat, robs, &nobs);
6316
6317 /* Read kernel data... */
6318 if (ctl->csi_kernel[0] != '-')
6319 read_kernel(ctl->csi_kernel, kz, kw, &nk);
6320
6321 /* Create new file... */
6322 LOG(1, "Write CSI data: %s", filename);
6323 if (!(out = fopen(filename, "w")))
6324 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");
6325
6326 /* Write header... */
6327 fprintf(out,
6328 "# $1 = time [s]\n"
6329 "# $2 = number of hits (cx)\n"
6330 "# $3 = number of misses (cy)\n"
6331 "# $4 = number of false alarms (cz)\n"
6332 "# $5 = number of observations (cx + cy)\n"
6333 "# $6 = number of forecasts (cx + cz)\n"
6334 "# $7 = bias (ratio of forecasts and observations) [%%]\n"
6335 "# $8 = probability of detection (POD) [%%]\n"
6336 "# $9 = false alarm rate (FAR) [%%]\n"
6337 "# $10 = critical success index (CSI) [%%]\n");
6338 fprintf(out,
6339 "# $11 = hits associated with random chance\n"
6340 "# $12 = equitable threat score (ETS) [%%]\n"
6341 "# $13 = Pearson linear correlation coefficient\n"
6342 "# $14 = Spearman rank-order correlation coefficient\n"
6343 "# $15 = column density mean error (F - O) [kg/m^2]\n"
6344 "# $16 = column density root mean square error (RMSE) [kg/m^2]\n"
6345 "# $17 = column density mean absolute error [kg/m^2]\n"
6346 "# $18 = number of data points\n\n");
6347
6348 /* Set grid box size... */
6349 dz = (ctl->csi_z1 - ctl->csi_z0) / ctl->csi_nz;
6350 dlon = (ctl->csi_lon1 - ctl->csi_lon0) / ctl->csi_nx;
6351 dlat = (ctl->csi_lat1 - ctl->csi_lat0) / ctl->csi_ny;
6352
6353 /* Set horizontal coordinates... */
6354 for (iy = 0; iy < ctl->csi_ny; iy++) {
6355 double lat = ctl->csi_lat0 + dlat * (iy + 0.5);
6356 area[iy] = dlat * dlon * SQR(RE * M_PI / 180.) * cos(lat * M_PI / 180.);
6357 }
6358 }
6359
6360 /* Set time interval... */
6361 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
6362 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
6363
6364 /* Allocate... */
6365 ALLOC(modmean, double,
6366 ctl->csi_nx * ctl->csi_ny * ctl->csi_nz);
6367 ALLOC(obsmean, double,
6368 ctl->csi_nx * ctl->csi_ny * ctl->csi_nz);
6369 ALLOC(obscount, int,
6370 ctl->csi_nx * ctl->csi_ny * ctl->csi_nz);
6371
6372 /* Loop over observations... */
6373 for (int i = 0; i < nobs; i++) {
6374
6375 /* Check time... */
6376 if (rt[i] < t0)
6377 continue;
6378 else if (rt[i] >= t1)
6379 break;
6380
6381 /* Check observation data... */
6382 if (!isfinite(robs[i]))
6383 continue;
6384
6385 /* Calculate indices... */
6386 ix = (int) ((rlon[i] - ctl->csi_lon0) / dlon);
6387 iy = (int) ((rlat[i] - ctl->csi_lat0) / dlat);
6388 iz = (int) ((rz[i] - ctl->csi_z0) / dz);
6389
6390 /* Check indices... */
6391 if (ix < 0 || ix >= ctl->csi_nx ||
6392 iy < 0 || iy >= ctl->csi_ny || iz < 0 || iz >= ctl->csi_nz)
6393 continue;
6394
6395 /* Get mean observation index... */
6396 int idx = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->csi_ny, iz, ctl->csi_nz);
6397 obsmean[idx] += robs[i];
6398 obscount[idx]++;
6399 }
6400
6401 /* Analyze model data... */
6402 for (ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++) {
6403
6404 /* Check time... */
6405 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
6406 continue;
6407
6408 /* Get indices... */
6409 ix = (int) ((atm->lon[ip] - ctl->csi_lon0) / dlon);
6410 iy = (int) ((atm->lat[ip] - ctl->csi_lat0) / dlat);
6411 iz = (int) ((Z(atm->p[ip]) - ctl->csi_z0) / dz);
6412
6413 /* Check indices... */
6414 if (ix < 0 || ix >= ctl->csi_nx ||
6415 iy < 0 || iy >= ctl->csi_ny || iz < 0 || iz >= ctl->csi_nz)
6416 continue;
6417
6418 /* Get total mass in grid cell... */
6419 int idx = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->csi_ny, iz, ctl->csi_nz);
6420 modmean[idx] += kernel_weight(kz, kw, nk, atm->p[ip])
6421 * atm->q[ctl->qnt_m][ip];
6422 }
6423
6424 /* Analyze all grid cells... */
6425 for (ix = 0; ix < ctl->csi_nx; ix++)
6426 for (iy = 0; iy < ctl->csi_ny; iy++)
6427 for (iz = 0; iz < ctl->csi_nz; iz++) {
6428
6429 /* Calculate mean observation index... */
6430 int idx = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->csi_ny, iz, ctl->csi_nz);
6431 if (obscount[idx] > 0)
6432 obsmean[idx] /= obscount[idx];
6433
6434 /* Calculate column density... */
6435 if (modmean[idx] > 0)
6436 modmean[idx] /= (1e6 * area[iy]);
6437
6438 /* Calculate CSI... */
6439 if (obscount[idx] > 0) {
6440 ct++;
6441 if (obsmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_obsmin &&
6442 modmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_modmin)
6443 cx++;
6444 else if (obsmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_obsmin &&
6445 modmean[idx] < ctl->csi_modmin)
6446 cy++;
6447 else if (obsmean[idx] < ctl->csi_obsmin &&
6448 modmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_modmin)
6449 cz++;
6450 }
6451
6452 /* Save data for other verification statistics... */
6453 if (obscount[idx] > 0
6454 && (obsmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_obsmin
6455 || modmean[idx] >= ctl->csi_modmin)) {
6456 x[n] = modmean[idx];
6457 y[n] = obsmean[idx];
6458 if ((++n) > NCSI)
6459 ERRMSG("Too many data points to calculate statistics!");
6460 }
6461 }
6462
6463 /* Write output... */
6464 if (fmod(t, ctl->csi_dt_out) == 0) {
6465
6466 /* Calculate verification statistics
6467 (https://www.cawcr.gov.au/projects/verification/) ... */
6468 static double work[2 * NCSI];
6469 int n_obs = cx + cy;
6470 int n_for = cx + cz;
6471 double bias = (n_obs > 0) ? 100. * n_for / n_obs : GSL_NAN;
6472 double pod = (n_obs > 0) ? (100. * cx) / n_obs : GSL_NAN;
6473 double far = (n_for > 0) ? (100. * cz) / n_for : GSL_NAN;
6474 double csi = (cx + cy + cz > 0) ? (100. * cx) / (cx + cy + cz) : GSL_NAN;
6475 double cx_rd = (ct > 0) ? (1. * n_obs * n_for) / ct : GSL_NAN;
6476 double ets = (cx + cy + cz - cx_rd > 0) ?
6477 (100. * (cx - cx_rd)) / (cx + cy + cz - cx_rd) : GSL_NAN;
6478 double rho_p =
6479 (n > 0) ? gsl_stats_correlation(x, 1, y, 1, (size_t) n) : GSL_NAN;
6480 double rho_s =
6481 (n > 0) ? gsl_stats_spearman(x, 1, y, 1, (size_t) n, work) : GSL_NAN;
6482 for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
6483 work[i] = x[i] - y[i];
6484 double mean = (n > 0) ? gsl_stats_mean(work, 1, (size_t) n) : GSL_NAN;
6485 double rmse = (n > 0) ? gsl_stats_sd_with_fixed_mean(work, 1, (size_t) n,
6486 0.0) : GSL_NAN;
6487 double absdev =
6488 (n > 0) ? gsl_stats_absdev_m(work, 1, (size_t) n, 0.0) : GSL_NAN;
6489
6490 /* Write... */
6491 fprintf(out, "%.2f %d %d %d %d %d %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %d\n",
6492 t, cx, cy, cz, n_obs, n_for, bias, pod, far, csi, cx_rd, ets,
6493 rho_p, rho_s, mean, rmse, absdev, n);
6494
6495 /* Set counters to zero... */
6496 n = ct = cx = cy = cz = 0;
6497 }
6498
6499 /* Free... */
6500 free(modmean);
6501 free(obsmean);
6502 free(obscount);
6503
6504 /* Finalize... */
6505 if (t == ctl->t_stop) {
6506
6507 /* Close output file... */
6508 fclose(out);
6509
6510 /* Free... */
6511 free(area);
6512 free(rt);
6513 free(rz);
6514 free(rlon);
6515 free(rlat);
6516 free(robs);
6517 }
6518}

6536 SELECT_TIMER("WRITE_ENS", "OUTPUT", NVTX_WRITE);
6537

6539 if (ctl->qnt_ens < 0)
6540 ERRMSG("Missing ensemble IDs!");
6541
6542 /* Set time interval... */

6544 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;

6546 /* Init... */

6548 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++)

6550 xm[i][0] = xm[i][1] = xm[i][2] = zm[i] = 0;
6551 n[i] = 0;

6602 fprintf(out, " ");
6603 fprintf(out, ctl->qnt_format[iq], qm[iq][i] / n[i]);
6604 }
6605 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
6606 fprintf(out, " ");
6607 double var = qs[iq][i] / n[i] - SQR(qm[iq][i] / n[i]);
6608 fprintf(out, ctl->qnt_format[iq], (var > 0 ? sqrt(var) : 0));
6609 }
6610 fprintf(out, " %d\n", n[i]);
6611 }
6612
6613 /* Close file... */
6614 fclose(out);
6615}

6683 double dlat = (ctl->grid_lat1 - ctl->grid_lat0) / ctl->grid_ny;
6684
6685 /* Set vertical coordinates... */
6686#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
6687 for (int iz = 0; iz < ctl->grid_nz; iz++) {
6688 z[iz] = ctl->grid_z0 + dz * (iz + 0.5);
6689 press[iz] = P(z[iz]);
6690 }
6691
6692 /* Set horizontal coordinates... */
6693 for (int ix = 0; ix < ctl->grid_nx; ix++)
6694 lon[ix] = ctl->grid_lon0 + dlon * (ix + 0.5);
6695#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
6696 for (int iy = 0; iy < ctl->grid_ny; iy++) {
6697 lat[iy] = ctl->grid_lat0 + dlat * (iy + 0.5);
6698 area[iy] = dlat * dlon * SQR(RE * M_PI / 180.)
6699 * cos(lat[iy] * M_PI / 180.);
6700 }
6701
6702 /* Set time interval for output... */
6703 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
6704 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
6705
6706 /* Get grid box indices... */
6707#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
6708 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++) {
6709 ixs[ip] = (int) ((atm->lon[ip] - ctl->grid_lon0) / dlon);
6710 iys[ip] = (int) ((atm->lat[ip] - ctl->grid_lat0) / dlat);
6711 izs[ip] = (int) ((Z(atm->p[ip]) - ctl->grid_z0) / dz);
6712 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1
6713 || ixs[ip] < 0 || ixs[ip] >= ctl->grid_nx
6714 || iys[ip] < 0 || iys[ip] >= ctl->grid_ny
6715 || izs[ip] < 0 || izs[ip] >= ctl->grid_nz)
6716 izs[ip] = -1;
6717 }
6718
6719 /* Average data... */
6720 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++)
6721 if (izs[ip] >= 0) {
6722 int idx =
6723 ARRAY_3D(ixs[ip], iys[ip], ctl->grid_ny, izs[ip], ctl->grid_nz);
6724 double kernel = kernel_weight(kz, kw, nk, atm->p[ip]);
6725 np[idx]++;
6726 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
6727 mean[iq][idx] += kernel * atm->q[iq][ip];
6728 stddev[iq][idx] += SQR(kernel * atm->q[iq][ip]);
6729 }
6730 }
6731
6732 /* Calculate column density and volume mixing ratio... */
6733#pragma omp parallel for default(shared)
6734 for (int ix = 0; ix < ctl->grid_nx; ix++)
6735 for (int iy = 0; iy < ctl->grid_ny; iy++)
6736 for (int iz = 0; iz < ctl->grid_nz; iz++) {
6737
6738 /* Get grid index... */
6739 int idx = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->grid_ny, iz, ctl->grid_nz);
6740
6741 /* Calculate column density... */
6742 cd[idx] = GSL_NAN;
6743 if (ctl->qnt_m >= 0)
6744 cd[idx] = mean[ctl->qnt_m][idx] / (1e6 * area[iy]);
6745
6746 /* Calculate volume mixing ratio (implicit)... */
6747 vmr_impl[idx] = GSL_NAN;
6748 if (ctl->qnt_m >= 0 && ctl->molmass > 0 && met0 != NULL
6749 && met1 != NULL) {
6750 vmr_impl[idx] = 0;
6751 if (mean[ctl->qnt_m][idx] > 0) {
6752
6753 /* Get temperature... */
6754 double temp;
6755 INTPOL_INIT;
6756 intpol_met_time_3d(met0, met0->t, met1, met1->t, t, press[iz],
6757 lon[ix], lat[iy], &temp, ci, cw, 1);
6758
6759 /* Calculate volume mixing ratio... */
6760 vmr_impl[idx] = MA / ctl->molmass * mean[ctl->qnt_m][idx]
6761 / (RHO(press[iz], temp) * 1e6 * area[iy] * 1e3 * dz);
6762 }
6763 }
6764
6765 /* Calculate mean... */
6766 if (np[idx] > 0)
6767 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
6768 mean[iq][idx] /= np[idx];
6769 double var = stddev[iq][idx] / np[idx] - SQR(mean[iq][idx]);
6770 stddev[iq][idx] = (var > 0 ? sqrt(var) : 0);
6771 } else
6772 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
6773 mean[iq][idx] = GSL_NAN;
6774 stddev[iq][idx] = GSL_NAN;
6775 }
6776 }
6777
6778 /* Write ASCII data... */
6779 if (ctl->grid_type == 0)
6780 write_grid_asc(filename, ctl, cd, mean, stddev, vmr_impl,
6781 t, z, lon, lat, area, dz, np);
6782
6783 /* Write netCDF data... */
6784 else if (ctl->grid_type == 1)
6785 write_grid_nc(filename, ctl, cd, mean, stddev, vmr_impl,
6786 t, z, lon, lat, area, dz, np);
6787
6788 /* Error message... */
6789 else
6790 ERRMSG("Grid data format GRID_TYPE unknown!");
6791
6792 /* Free... */
6793 free(cd);
6794 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
6795 free(mean[iq]);
6796 free(stddev[iq]);
6797 }
6798 free(vmr_impl);
6799 free(z);
6800 free(lon);
6801 free(lat);
6802 free(area);
6803 free(press);
6804 free(np);
6805 free(ixs);
6806 free(iys);
6807 free(izs);
6808}

6907 }
6908 }

7256 {
7257
7258 static FILE *out;

7260 static double *mass, *obsmean, *rt, *rz, *rlon, *rlat, *robs, *area,
7261 dz, dlon, dlat, *lon, *lat, *z, *press, temp, vmr, h2o, o3;
7262
7263 static int nobs, *obscount, ip, okay;
7264
7265 /* Set timer... */
7266 SELECT_TIMER("WRITE_PROF", "OUTPUT", NVTX_WRITE);
7267
7268 /* Init... */
7269 if (t == ctl->t_start) {
7270
7271 /* Check quantity index for mass... */
7272 if (ctl->qnt_m < 0)
7273 ERRMSG("Need quantity mass!");
7274
7275 /* Check molar mass... */
7276 if (ctl->molmass <= 0)
7277 ERRMSG("Specify molar mass!");
7278
7279 /* Allocate... */
7280 ALLOC(lon, double,
7281 ctl->prof_nx);
7282 ALLOC(lat, double,
7283 ctl->prof_ny);
7284 ALLOC(area, double,
7285 ctl->prof_ny);
7286 ALLOC(z, double,
7287 ctl->prof_nz);
7288 ALLOC(press, double,
7289 ctl->prof_nz);
7290 ALLOC(rt, double,
7291 NOBS);
7292 ALLOC(rz, double,
7293 NOBS);
7294 ALLOC(rlon, double,
7295 NOBS);
7296 ALLOC(rlat, double,
7297 NOBS);
7298 ALLOC(robs, double,
7299 NOBS);
7300
7301 /* Read observation data... */
7302 read_obs(ctl->prof_obsfile, ctl, rt, rz, rlon, rlat, robs, &nobs);
7303
7304 /* Create new output file... */
7305 LOG(1, "Write profile data: %s", filename);
7306 if (!(out = fopen(filename, "w")))
7307 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");
7308
7309 /* Write header... */
7310 fprintf(out,
7311 "# $1 = time [s]\n"
7312 "# $2 = altitude [km]\n"
7313 "# $3 = longitude [deg]\n"
7314 "# $4 = latitude [deg]\n"
7315 "# $5 = pressure [hPa]\n"
7316 "# $6 = temperature [K]\n"
7317 "# $7 = volume mixing ratio [ppv]\n"
7318 "# $8 = H2O volume mixing ratio [ppv]\n"
7319 "# $9 = O3 volume mixing ratio [ppv]\n"
7320 "# $10 = observed BT index [K]\n"
7321 "# $11 = number of observations\n");
7322
7323 /* Set grid box size... */
7324 dz = (ctl->prof_z1 - ctl->prof_z0) / ctl->prof_nz;
7325 dlon = (ctl->prof_lon1 - ctl->prof_lon0) / ctl->prof_nx;
7326 dlat = (ctl->prof_lat1 - ctl->prof_lat0) / ctl->prof_ny;
7327
7328 /* Set vertical coordinates... */
7329 for (int iz = 0; iz < ctl->prof_nz; iz++) {
7330 z[iz] = ctl->prof_z0 + dz * (iz + 0.5);
7331 press[iz] = P(z[iz]);
7332 }
7333
7334 /* Set horizontal coordinates... */
7335 for (int ix = 0; ix < ctl->prof_nx; ix++)
7336 lon[ix] = ctl->prof_lon0 + dlon * (ix + 0.5);
7337 for (int iy = 0; iy < ctl->prof_ny; iy++) {
7338 lat[iy] = ctl->prof_lat0 + dlat * (iy + 0.5);
7339 area[iy] = dlat * dlon * SQR(RE * M_PI / 180.)
7340 * cos(lat[iy] * M_PI / 180.);
7341 }
7342 }
7343
7344 /* Set time interval... */
7345 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7346 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7347
7348 /* Allocate... */
7349 ALLOC(mass, double,
7350 ctl->prof_nx * ctl->prof_ny * ctl->prof_nz);
7351 ALLOC(obsmean, double,
7352 ctl->prof_nx * ctl->prof_ny);
7353 ALLOC(obscount, int,
7354 ctl->prof_nx * ctl->prof_ny);
7355
7356 /* Loop over observations... */
7357 for (int i = 0; i < nobs; i++) {
7358
7359 /* Check time... */
7360 if (rt[i] < t0)
7361 continue;
7362 else if (rt[i] >= t1)
7363 break;
7364
7365 /* Check observation data... */
7366 if (!isfinite(robs[i]))
7367 continue;
7368
7369 /* Calculate indices... */
7370 int ix = (int) ((rlon[i] - ctl->prof_lon0) / dlon);
7371 int iy = (int) ((rlat[i] - ctl->prof_lat0) / dlat);
7372
7373 /* Check indices... */
7374 if (ix < 0 || ix >= ctl->prof_nx || iy < 0 || iy >= ctl->prof_ny)
7375 continue;
7376
7377 /* Get mean observation index... */
7378 int idx = ARRAY_2D(ix, iy, ctl->prof_ny);
7379 obsmean[idx] += robs[i];
7380 obscount[idx]++;
7381 }
7382
7383 /* Analyze model data... */
7384 for (ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++) {
7385
7386 /* Check time... */
7387 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7388 continue;
7389
7390 /* Get indices... */
7391 int ix = (int) ((atm->lon[ip] - ctl->prof_lon0) / dlon);
7392 int iy = (int) ((atm->lat[ip] - ctl->prof_lat0) / dlat);
7393 int iz = (int) ((Z(atm->p[ip]) - ctl->prof_z0) / dz);
7394
7395 /* Check indices... */
7396 if (ix < 0 || ix >= ctl->prof_nx ||
7397 iy < 0 || iy >= ctl->prof_ny || iz < 0 || iz >= ctl->prof_nz)
7398 continue;
7399
7400 /* Get total mass in grid cell... */
7401 int idx = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->prof_ny, iz, ctl->prof_nz);
7402 mass[idx] += atm->q[ctl->qnt_m][ip];
7403 }
7404
7405 /* Extract profiles... */
7406 for (int ix = 0; ix < ctl->prof_nx; ix++)
7407 for (int iy = 0; iy < ctl->prof_ny; iy++) {
7408 int idx2 = ARRAY_2D(ix, iy, ctl->prof_ny);
7409 if (obscount[idx2] > 0) {
7410
7411 /* Check profile... */
7412 okay = 0;
7413 for (int iz = 0; iz < ctl->prof_nz; iz++) {
7414 int idx3 = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->prof_ny, iz, ctl->prof_nz);
7415 if (mass[idx3] > 0) {
7416 okay = 1;
7417 break;
7418 }
7419 }
7420 if (!okay)
7421 continue;
7422
7423 /* Write output... */
7424 fprintf(out, "\n");
7425
7426 /* Loop over altitudes... */
7427 for (int iz = 0; iz < ctl->prof_nz; iz++) {
7428
7429 /* Get temperature, water vapor, and ozone... */
7430 INTPOL_INIT;
7431 intpol_met_time_3d(met0, met0->t, met1, met1->t, t, press[iz],
7432 lon[ix], lat[iy], &temp, ci, cw, 1);
7433 intpol_met_time_3d(met0, met0->h2o, met1, met1->h2o, t, press[iz],
7434 lon[ix], lat[iy], &h2o, ci, cw, 0);
7435 intpol_met_time_3d(met0, met0->o3, met1, met1->o3, t, press[iz],
7436 lon[ix], lat[iy], &o3, ci, cw, 0);
7437
7438 /* Calculate volume mixing ratio... */
7439 int idx3 = ARRAY_3D(ix, iy, ctl->prof_ny, iz, ctl->prof_nz);
7440 vmr = MA / ctl->molmass * mass[idx3]
7441 / (RHO(press[iz], temp) * area[iy] * dz * 1e9);
7442
7443 /* Write output... */
7444 fprintf(out, "%.2f %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %d\n",
7445 t, z[iz], lon[ix], lat[iy], press[iz], temp, vmr, h2o, o3,
7446 obsmean[idx2] / obscount[idx2], obscount[idx2]);
7447 }
7448 }
7449 }
7450
7451 /* Free... */
7452 free(mass);
7453 free(obsmean);
7454 free(obscount);
7455
7456 /* Finalize... */
7457 if (t == ctl->t_stop) {
7458
7459 /* Close output file... */
7460 fclose(out);
7461
7462 /* Free... */
7463 free(lon);
7464 free(lat);
7465 free(area);
7466 free(z);
7467 free(press);
7468 free(rt);
7469 free(rz);
7470 free(rlon);
7471 free(rlat);
7472 free(robs);
7473 }
7474}

7484 {
7485
7486 static FILE *out;
7487
7488 static double area, dlat, rmax2, *rt, *rz, *rlon, *rlat, *robs, kz[EP],
7489 kw[EP];
7490
7491 static int nobs, nk;
7492
7493 /* Set timer... */
7494 SELECT_TIMER("WRITE_SAMPLE", "OUTPUT", NVTX_WRITE);
7495
7496 /* Init... */
7497 if (t == ctl->t_start) {
7498
7499 /* Allocate... */
7500 ALLOC(rt, double,
7501 NOBS);
7502 ALLOC(rz, double,
7503 NOBS);
7504 ALLOC(rlon, double,
7505 NOBS);
7506 ALLOC(rlat, double,
7507 NOBS);
7508 ALLOC(robs, double,
7509 NOBS);
7510
7511 /* Read observation data... */
7512 read_obs(ctl->sample_obsfile, ctl, rt, rz, rlon, rlat, robs, &nobs);
7513
7514 /* Read kernel data... */
7515 if (ctl->sample_kernel[0] != '-')
7516 read_kernel(ctl->sample_kernel, kz, kw, &nk);
7517
7518 /* Create output file... */
7519 LOG(1, "Write sample data: %s", filename);
7520 if (!(out = fopen(filename, "w")))
7521 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");
7522
7523 /* Write header... */
7524 fprintf(out,
7525 "# $1 = time [s]\n"
7526 "# $2 = altitude [km]\n"
7527 "# $3 = longitude [deg]\n"
7528 "# $4 = latitude [deg]\n"
7529 "# $5 = surface area [km^2]\n"
7530 "# $6 = layer depth [km]\n"
7531 "# $7 = number of particles [1]\n"
7532 "# $8 = column density [kg/m^2]\n"
7533 "# $9 = volume mixing ratio [ppv]\n"
7534 "# $10 = observed BT index [K]\n\n");
7535
7536 /* Set latitude range, squared radius, and area... */
7537 dlat = DY2DEG(ctl->sample_dx);
7538 rmax2 = SQR(ctl->sample_dx);
7539 area = M_PI * rmax2;
7540 }
7541
7542 /* Set time interval for output... */
7543 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7544 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7545
7546 /* Loop over observations... */
7547 for (int i = 0; i < nobs; i++) {
7548
7549 /* Check time... */
7550 if (rt[i] < t0)
7551 continue;
7552 else if (rt[i] >= t1)
7553 break;
7554
7555 /* Calculate Cartesian coordinates... */
7556 double x0[3];
7557 geo2cart(0, rlon[i], rlat[i], x0);
7558
7559 /* Set pressure range... */
7560 double rp = P(rz[i]);
7561 double ptop = P(rz[i] + ctl->sample_dz);
7562 double pbot = P(rz[i] - ctl->sample_dz);
7563
7564 /* Init... */
7565 double mass = 0;
7566 int np = 0;
7567
7568 /* Loop over air parcels... */
7569#pragma omp parallel for default(shared) reduction(+:mass,np)
7570 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++) {
7571
7572 /* Check time... */
7573 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7574 continue;
7575
7576 /* Check latitude... */
7577 if (fabs(rlat[i] - atm->lat[ip]) > dlat)
7578 continue;
7579
7580 /* Check horizontal distance... */
7581 double x1[3];
7582 geo2cart(0, atm->lon[ip], atm->lat[ip], x1);
7583 if (DIST2(x0, x1) > rmax2)
7584 continue;
7585
7586 /* Check pressure... */
7587 if (ctl->sample_dz > 0)
7588 if (atm->p[ip] > pbot || atm->p[ip] < ptop)
7589 continue;
7590
7591 /* Add mass... */
7592 if (ctl->qnt_m >= 0)
7593 mass +=
7594 kernel_weight(kz, kw, nk, atm->p[ip]) * atm->q[ctl->qnt_m][ip];
7595 np++;
7596 }
7597
7598 /* Calculate column density... */
7599 double cd = mass / (1e6 * area);
7600
7601 /* Calculate volume mixing ratio... */
7602 double vmr = 0;
7603 if (ctl->molmass > 0 && ctl->sample_dz > 0) {
7604 if (mass > 0) {
7605
7606 /* Get temperature... */
7607 double temp;
7608 INTPOL_INIT;
7609 intpol_met_time_3d(met0, met0->t, met1, met1->t, rt[i], rp,
7610 rlon[i], rlat[i], &temp, ci, cw, 1);
7611
7612 /* Calculate volume mixing ratio... */
7613 vmr = MA / ctl->molmass * mass
7614 / (RHO(rp, temp) * 1e6 * area * 1e3 * ctl->sample_dz);
7615 }
7616 } else
7617 vmr = GSL_NAN;
7618
7619 /* Write output... */
7620 fprintf(out, "%.2f %g %g %g %g %g %d %g %g %g\n", rt[i], rz[i],
7621 rlon[i], rlat[i], area, ctl->sample_dz, np, cd, vmr, robs[i]);
7622 }
7623
7624 /* Finalize...... */
7625 if (t == ctl->t_stop) {
7626
7627 /* Close output file... */
7628 fclose(out);
7629
7630 /* Free... */
7631 free(rt);
7632 free(rz);
7633 free(rlon);
7634 free(rlat);
7635 free(robs);
7636 }
7637}

7656
7657 /* Write info... */

7659
7660 /* Create new file... */

7662 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");

7666 "# $1 = time [s]\n"
7667 "# $2 = altitude [km]\n"
7668 "# $3 = longitude [deg]\n" "# $4 = latitude [deg]\n");

7670 fprintf(out, "# $%i = %s [%s]\n", (iq + 5),
7671 ctl->qnt_name[iq], ctl->qnt_unit[iq]);
7672 fprintf(out, "\n");
7673
7674 /* Set geolocation and search radius... */
7675 geo2cart(0, ctl->stat_lon, ctl->stat_lat, x0);

7677 }

7684 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip++) {
7685

7687 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7688 continue;
7689
7690 /* Check time range for station output... */
7691 if (atm->time[ip] < ctl->stat_t0 || atm->time[ip] > ctl->stat_t1)
7692 continue;
7693
7694 /* Check station flag... */
7695 if (ctl->qnt_stat >= 0)
7696 if (atm->q[ctl->qnt_stat][ip])
7697 continue;
7698
7699 /* Get Cartesian coordinates... */
7700 geo2cart(0, atm->lon[ip], atm->lat[ip], x1);
7701
7702 /* Check horizontal distance... */
7703 if (DIST2(x0, x1) > rmax2)
7704 continue;
7705
7706 /* Set station flag... */
7707 if (ctl->qnt_stat >= 0)
7708 atm->q[ctl->qnt_stat][ip] = 1;
7709
7710 /* Write data... */
7711 fprintf(out, "%.2f %g %g %g",
7712 atm->time[ip], Z(atm->p[ip]), atm->lon[ip], atm->lat[ip]);
7713 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
7714 fprintf(out, " ");
7715 fprintf(out, ctl->qnt_format[iq], atm->q[iq][ip]);
7716 }
7717 fprintf(out, "\n");
7718 }
7719
7720 /* Close file... */
7721 if (t == ctl->t_stop)
7722 fclose(out);
7723}

void write_vtk ( const char *  filename,

atm_t *  atm,

)

Definition at line 7727 of file libtrac.c.

7731 {
7732
7733 FILE *out;
7734
7735 /* Set timer... */
7736 SELECT_TIMER("WRITE_VTK", "OUTPUT", NVTX_WRITE);
7737
7738 /* Write info... */
7739 LOG(1, "Write VTK data: %s", filename);
7740
7741 /* Set time interval for output... */
7742 double t0 = t - 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7743 double t1 = t + 0.5 * ctl->dt_mod;
7744
7745 /* Create file... */
7746 if (!(out = fopen(filename, "w")))
7747 ERRMSG("Cannot create file!");
7748
7749 /* Count data points... */
7750 int np = 0;
7751 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip += ctl->vtk_stride) {
7752 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7753 continue;
7754 np++;
7755 }
7756
7757 /* Write header... */
7758 fprintf(out,
7759 "# vtk DataFile Version 3.0\n"
7760 "vtk output\n" "ASCII\n" "DATASET POLYDATA\n");
7761
7762 /* Write point coordinates... */
7763 fprintf(out, "POINTS %d float\n", np);
7764 if (ctl->vtk_sphere) {
7765 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip += ctl->vtk_stride) {
7766 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7767 continue;
7768 double radius = (RE + Z(atm->p[ip]) * ctl->vtk_scale
7769 + ctl->vtk_offset) / RE;
7770 double x = radius * cos(atm->lat[ip] / 180. * M_PI)
7771 * cos(atm->lon[ip] / 180. * M_PI);
7772 double y = radius * cos(atm->lat[ip] / 180. * M_PI)
7773 * sin(atm->lon[ip] / 180. * M_PI);
7774 double z = radius * sin(atm->lat[ip] / 180. * M_PI);
7775 fprintf(out, "%g %g %g\n", x, y, z);
7776 }
7777 } else
7778 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip += ctl->vtk_stride) {
7779 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7780 continue;
7781 fprintf(out, "%g %g %g\n", atm->lon[ip], atm->lat[ip],
7782 Z(atm->p[ip]) * ctl->vtk_scale + ctl->vtk_offset);
7783 }
7784
7785 /* Write point data... */
7786 fprintf(out, "POINT_DATA %d\n", np);
7787 for (int iq = 0; iq < ctl->nq; iq++) {
7788 fprintf(out, "SCALARS %s float 1\n" "LOOKUP_TABLE default\n",
7789 ctl->qnt_name[iq]);
7790 for (int ip = 0; ip < atm->np; ip += ctl->vtk_stride) {
7791 if (atm->time[ip] < t0 || atm->time[ip] > t1)
7792 continue;
7793 fprintf(out, "%g\n", atm->q[iq][ip]);
7794 }
7795 }
7796
7797 /* Close file... */
7798 fclose(out);
7799}
